---
title: "Six Species RNA-seq Comparative Analysis"
output: pdf_document
date: "2025-08-11"
---

01/26/26 - In this update I have eliminated X. maculatus samples from the workflow. Collaborators have indicated that this sample muddles the message due to speculation of poor sampling ages (in males specifically) which led to few DEGs. 

10/21/25 - I just realized that I am looking only at mRNA not non-coding RNA when making my gene2tx2protein objects. That would make sense as non-coding RNA should not fall into orthogroups as these groups are defined by proteins

In this update I have focused on orthogroup and DEG analysis. I have gotten rid of WGCNA component, please refer to V3 for that analysis. I have also included interaction terms in my analysis.


#load libraries
```{r}
library(WGCNA)
library(xlsx)
library(dplyr)
library(GenomicFeatures)
library(tximport)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggvenn)
library(colorRamp2)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(ape) #for "read.tree"
library(tidyverse) #for forats
library(UpSetR)
library(tools) #for toTitleCase
library(scales) #for label_wrap()
library(RVenn) #for Venn() and overlap()
```

#---------------------------
#fly (D melanogaster)
##Importing data
```{r}
fly_sample_table = read.xlsx("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Metatdata/flyMetadata.xlsx", sheetIndex = 1, header = T, stringsAsFactors = T)
row.names(fly_sample_table)=fly_sample_table$Sample_ID

fly_sample_files = paste0("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Quants/flyQuants/",
                           pull(fly_sample_table, Sample_ID), '/abundance.tsv')
names(fly_sample_files) = pull(fly_sample_table, Sample_ID)
all(file.exists(fly_sample_files))
data.frame(thefiles = fly_sample_files, doihave = file.exists(fly_sample_files))
## make a tx2gene object
#fly_tx2gene = gene2tx2protein_fly %>% select(transcript,gene) ## Error after tximport: transcripts missing from tx2gene: 3737

txdb_fly <- makeTxDbFromGFF("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/genomes/Drosophila_melanogaster/ncbi_dataset/data/GCF_000001215.4/genomic.gff",
                        format = "gff",
                        organism = "Drosophila melanogaster")
k_fly <- keys(txdb_fly, keytype = "TXNAME")
tx2gene_fly <- AnnotationDbi::select(txdb_fly, k_fly, "GENEID", "TXNAME")
tx2gene_fly$TXNAME <- gsub("\\.[0-9]","",tx2gene_fly$TXNAME) #error from tximport: transcripts missing from tx2gene: 9

## Import the quants
fly_count_data = tximport(files = fly_sample_files,
                           type = "kallisto",
                           tx2gene = tx2gene_fly,
                           ignoreTxVersion = T)
```

## Pre-filtering
```{r}
## quickly re-level the factors in the Age column to make young the control
fly_sample_table$Age <- relevel(fly_sample_table$Age, "young")
sapply(fly_sample_table, levels) # this checks the levels of the factors sapply()

fly_dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(fly_count_data, 
                                   colData = fly_sample_table, 
                                   design = ~ Sex + Age)

#I am using groups to test for interactions between Sex:Age in my data instead of putting this in my model matrix. This is a simpiler way of doing this as was explained in the Vignette - https://bioconductor.org/packages/devel/bioc/vignettes/DESeq2/inst/doc/DESeq2.html#interactions
colData(fly_dds)
fly_dds$group <- factor(paste0(fly_dds$Age, fly_dds$Sex))
design(fly_dds) <- ~ 0 + group
colData(fly_dds)


# now I am filtering
dim(fly_dds) # 17,206 genes before filtering
fly_smallestGroupSize <- 4
fly_keep <- rowSums(counts(fly_dds) >= 10) >= fly_smallestGroupSize
fly_dds <- fly_dds[fly_keep,]
dim(fly_dds) # 11,872 genes after filtering
```

## PCA 
```{r}
fly_vsd <- vst(fly_dds)
fly_pc12 <- plotPCA(fly_vsd, intgroup = c("Age", "Sex", "group"), returnData = T)

## new PCA that is colored the way I want
ggplot(fly_pc12, aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=Age)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Age), 
       colour="black",pch=21, size=3)  +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: 42% varience")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: 29% variance")) +
  ggtitle("D. melanogaster") +
  #coord_fixed() +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.95, geom = "polygon", alpha = 1/2, aes(fill = Age)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("young"="blue", "old"="orange")) + #only for Age 
  scale_color_manual(values=c("young"="blue", "old"="orange")) + #only for Age
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=18), 
        axis.title.x=element_text(size=18),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=18), 
        axis.title.y=element_text(size=18),
        legend.title = element_text(size=16),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.6, 'cm'),
        legend.position = c(0.91, 0.91)) #+
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-50,60))
```

## DESeq2
```{r}
fly_dds2 <- DESeq(fly_dds)
resultsNames(fly_dds2)

colData(fly_dds)
summary(results(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0))
#malefly_resSig <- subset(results(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05)
malefly_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05)


summary(results(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0))
#femfly_resSig <- subset(results(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05)
femfly_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05)


# interactions (Ageold.Sexmale) changes are reflective of males
summary(results(fly_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)) 
#flyInt_resSig <- subset(results(fly_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05 )
flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05)


malefly_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink)
femfly_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink)
flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink)
```

## Venn
```{r}
malefly_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene = rownames(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink)
femfly_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene = rownames(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink)
x_fly = list(Females = femfly_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malefly_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
ggvenn::ggvenn(x_fly,
     fill_color = c("darkgrey","white"),
     text_size = 6)


# Combine
flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene <- rownames(flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink)
x_flyAll = list(Females = femfly_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malefly_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
ggvenn::ggvenn(x_flyAll,
       fill_color = c("darkgrey","white","lightgrey"),
       text_size = 6)


# Interaction (males vs females & old vs young)
# flyInt_resSigUP <- subset(flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink, flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink$log2FoldChange > 0) %>% rownames_to_column("gene")
# flyInt_resSigDown <- subset(flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink, flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink$log2FoldChange < 0) %>% rownames_to_column("gene")
# x_flyInt = list(upregulatedInAgeMales = flyInt_resSigUP$gene, downregulatedInAgeMales = flyInt_resSigDown$gene)
# ggvenn::ggvenn(x_flyInt,
#        fill_color = c("darkgrey","white"),
#        text_size = 6)


## This will give me the names of all the genes in each circle of the venns above and save them in an excel that is sheet separated
#install.packages("gplots")
library(gplots)
testLST_fly <- list(Females = femfly_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malefly_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
venn_objectFly <- venn(testLST_fly, show.plot = F)
intersection_listFly <- attributes(venn_objectFly)$intersections
names(intersection_listFly) <- names(intersection_listFly) %>% gsub(":","_x_",.)
# write.xlsx(intersection_listFly, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Results/VennTablesDEGs/VennTables_Dmelanogaster.xlsx")
```

## HeatMap
```{r}
M_age_fly <- malefly_resSig_lfcShrink[c(6,2)]
names(M_age_fly)[2] = "Males"
F_age_fly <- femfly_resSig_lfcShrink[c(6,2)]
names(F_age_fly)[2] = "Females"
flyAgeCommonDEGs <- merge(F_age_fly, M_age_fly, by="Gene") 

rownames(flyAgeCommonDEGs) = flyAgeCommonDEGs$Gene
flyAgeCommonDEGs <- flyAgeCommonDEGs[,-1]
data_fly <- as.matrix(flyAgeCommonDEGs)
colo = colorRamp2(c(-1, 0, 1), c("#005AB5", "black", "#DC3220")) # Sets the color of the heatmap
Heatmap(data_fly, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs D. melanogaster", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 6), width = unit(7, "cm"), cluster_columns = F)

# make one with no rowNames for consitent size
Heatmap(data_fly, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs D. melanogaster", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 8), width = unit(5, "cm"), cluster_columns = F, show_row_names = FALSE, height = unit(5, "cm"))

### First using the Venn in above code chunch I will get a list of the gene names that I am loking for
x_flyAll_Shared <- Venn(list(Females = femfly_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malefly_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)) %>% overlap()
## Next i will subset the data_fish object to only include the genes I just got a list of
data_fly2 <- as.matrix(flyAgeCommonDEGs[x_flyAll_Shared,])
## Then i will plot them
Heatmap(data_fly2, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs D. melanogaster", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 1.5), width = unit(5, "cm"), cluster_columns = F, show_row_names = T, height = unit(5, "cm"))

# write.xlsx(as.data.frame(data_fly2), file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Results/sharredAndInteractionDEGs(all)11_29_25.xlsx", sheetName = "D. melanogaster", row.names = T, append = T)
```

## (Int) Hierarchcal clustering
```{r}
rlog_out_fly <- rlog(fly_dds, blind = F)
mat1_fly <- assay(rlog_out_fly)[flyInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene,]
colnames(mat1_fly)
dffly <- as.data.frame(colData(fly_dds)[,c("Sex","Age")])
flySampOrder <- order(dffly$Sex, dffly$Age)
mat1.scaled_fly <- t(apply(mat1_fly, 1, scale))
colnames(mat1.scaled_fly) <- colnames(mat1_fly)
dim(mat1.scaled_fly)
# define colors for annotations
annotationColorsList <- list(
  Age = c(young = "blue", old = "orange"),
  Sex = c(female = "#F8766D", male = "#00BFC4")
)
#graph
pheatmap(mat1.scaled_fly[, flySampOrder], col = colo, name = "z-score", annotation_col = dffly, cluster_rows = T, cluster_cols = F, show_rownames = F, show_colnames = F, cutree_rows = 2, annotation_colors = annotationColorsList, main = "Interactions D. melanogaster")
```

## Gene Ontology (Gene-set enrichment analysis)
```{r}
#install.packages("org.Dm.eg.db")
library(org.Dm.eg.db)
set.seed(1234)
### for males
maleFly_GO <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
maleFly_GO <- as.data.frame(maleFly_GO)
maleFly_GO$Gene <- rownames(maleFly_GO)

original_gene_list_maleFly <- maleFly_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_maleFly) <- maleFly_GO$Gene
gene_list_maleFly<-na.omit(original_gene_list_maleFly)
gene_list_maleFly = sort(gene_list_maleFly, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_maleFly <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_maleFly, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Dm.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#require(DOSE)
#dotplot(gse_maleFly, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_maleFly, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Old Males", y="")

### for females
femFly_GO <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type ="ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
femFly_GO <- as.data.frame(femFly_GO)
femFly_GO$Gene <- rownames(femFly_GO)

original_gene_list_femFly <- femFly_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_femFly) <- femFly_GO$Gene
gene_list_femFly<-na.omit(original_gene_list_femFly)
gene_list_femFly = sort(gene_list_femFly, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_femFly <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_femFly, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Dm.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#dotplot(gse_femFly, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_femFly, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Old Females", y="")


### for interactions
flyInt_GO <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
flyInt_GO <- as.data.frame(flyInt_GO)
flyInt_GO$Gene <- rownames(flyInt_GO)

original_gene_list_flyInt <- flyInt_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_flyInt) <- flyInt_GO$Gene
gene_list_flyInt<-na.omit(original_gene_list_flyInt)
gene_list_flyInt = sort(gene_list_flyInt, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_flyInt <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_flyInt, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Dm.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#dotplot(gse_flyInt, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_flyInt, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Interaction", y="")
```

#### Compare together GO terms
```{r}
mlist <- list(gse_maleFly, gse_femFly, gse_flyInt)
names(mlist) <- c("oldMales","oldFemales","Interaction")
mresults <- merge_result(mlist)
dotplot(mresults, showCategory=5, split=".sign", includeAll=T) +
  facet_grid(.~.sign) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1,)) +
  xlab("")

## let's try an upset and see what I get
maleFlyInAge_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_maleFly)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "MaleNES"))
femaleFlyInAge_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_femFly)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "FemaleNES"))
interactionFly_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_flyInt)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "InteractionNES"))

listInputs_1 <- list("Male_inAge" = maleFlyInAge_GOterms$GO.term,
                     "Female_inAge" = femaleFlyInAge_GOterms$GO.term,
                     "Interaction" =
                       interactionFly_GOterms$GO.term)
upset(fromList(listInputs_1), sets = c("Interaction","Male_inAge","Female_inAge"), keep.order = T, order.by = "degree", mainbar.y.label = "Shared GO terms", sets.x.label = "Total GO terms")
```

## KEGG (Gene-set enichment analysis)
```{r}
## Gene-set enrichment analysis
### for males
maleFly_ids<-bitr(names(original_gene_list_maleFly), fromType = "SYMBOL", 
                   toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Dm.eg.db")
dedup_ids_maleFly = maleFly_ids[!duplicated(maleFly_ids[c("SYMBOL")]),]
maleFly_GO2 = maleFly_GO[maleFly_GO$Gene %in% dedup_ids_maleFly$SYMBOL,]
maleFly_GO2$Y = dedup_ids_maleFly$ENTREZID
kegg_gene_list_maleFly <- maleFly_GO2$log2FoldChange
names(kegg_gene_list_maleFly) <- maleFly_GO2$Y
kegg_gene_list_maleFly<-na.omit(kegg_gene_list_maleFly)
kegg_gene_list_maleFly = sort(kegg_gene_list_maleFly, decreasing = TRUE)

kegg_organism = "dme"
kk2_maleFly <- gseKEGG(geneList     = kegg_gene_list_maleFly,
               organism     = kegg_organism,
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "ncbi-geneid",
               seed = T)


dotplot(kk2_maleFly, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)

### for females
femFly_ids<-bitr(names(original_gene_list_femFly), fromType = "SYMBOL", 
                   toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Dm.eg.db")
dedup_ids_femFly = femFly_ids[!duplicated(femFly_ids[c("SYMBOL")]),]
femFly_GO2 = femFly_GO[femFly_GO$Gene %in% dedup_ids_femFly$SYMBOL,]
femFly_GO2$Y = dedup_ids_femFly$ENTREZID
kegg_gene_list_femFly <- femFly_GO2$log2FoldChange
names(kegg_gene_list_femFly) <- femFly_GO2$Y
kegg_gene_list_femFly<-na.omit(kegg_gene_list_femFly)
kegg_gene_list_femFly = sort(kegg_gene_list_femFly, decreasing = TRUE)

kegg_organism = "dme"
kk2_femFly <- gseKEGG(geneList     = kegg_gene_list_femFly,
               organism     = kegg_organism,
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "ncbi-geneid",
               seed = T)


dotplot(kk2_femFly, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)

### for Interactions
flyInt_ids<-bitr(names(original_gene_list_flyInt), fromType = "SYMBOL", 
                   toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Dm.eg.db")
dedup_ids_flyInt = flyInt_ids[!duplicated(flyInt_ids[c("SYMBOL")]),]
flyInt_GO2 = flyInt_GO[flyInt_GO$Gene %in% dedup_ids_flyInt$SYMBOL,]
flyInt_GO2$Y = dedup_ids_flyInt$ENTREZID
kegg_gene_list_flyInt <- flyInt_GO2$log2FoldChange
names(kegg_gene_list_flyInt) <- flyInt_GO2$Y
kegg_gene_list_flyInt<-na.omit(kegg_gene_list_flyInt)
kegg_gene_list_flyInt = sort(kegg_gene_list_flyInt, decreasing = TRUE)

kegg_organism = "dme"
kk2_flyInt <- gseKEGG(geneList     = kegg_gene_list_flyInt,
               organism     = kegg_organism,
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "ncbi-geneid",
               seed = T)

dotplot(kk2_flyInt, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
```

#### Compare together KEGG Pathways
```{r}
mlist <- list(kk2_maleFly, kk2_femFly, kk2_flyInt)
names(mlist) <- c("oldMales","oldFemales","Interaction")
mresults <- merge_result(mlist)
dotplot(mresults, showCategory=5, split=".sign", includeAll=T) +
  facet_grid(.~.sign) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1,)) +
  xlab("")

## let's try an upset and see what I get
maleFlyInAge_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_maleFly)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "MaleNES"))
femaleFlyInAge_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_femFly)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "FemaleNES"))
interactionFly_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_flyInt)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "InteractionNES"))

listInputs_1 <- list("Male_inAge" = maleFlyInAge_KEGG$KEGG.pathway,
                     "Female_inAge" = femaleFlyInAge_KEGG$KEGG.pathway,
                     "Interaction" =
                       interactionFly_KEGG$KEGG.pathway)
upset(fromList(listInputs_1), sets = c("Interaction","Male_inAge","Female_inAge"), keep.order = T, order.by = "degree", mainbar.y.label = "Shared KEGG Pathways", sets.x.label = "Total KEGG Pathways")
```

#--------------------------
#Moth (P interpunctella)
##Importing data
```{r}
moth_sample_table = read.xlsx("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB008/metadata/mothMetadata.xlsx", sheetIndex = 1, header = T, stringsAsFactors = T)
row.names(moth_sample_table)=moth_sample_table$ID
moth_sample_table$Sex <- tolower(moth_sample_table$Sex) %>% as.factor()
moth_sample_table$Age <- tolower(moth_sample_table$Age) %>% as.factor()

moth_sample_files = paste0("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB008/quants/",
                           pull(moth_sample_table, ID), '/abundance.tsv')
names(moth_sample_files) = pull(moth_sample_table, ID)
all(file.exists(moth_sample_files))
data.frame(thefiles = moth_sample_files, doihave = file.exists(moth_sample_files))

txdb_moth <- makeTxDbFromGFF("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB008/genome/Plodia/ilPloInte3.1_GFF.gff",
                        format = "gff",
                        organism = "Plodia interpunctella")
k_moth <- keys(txdb_moth, keytype = "TXNAME")
tx2gene_moth <- AnnotationDbi::select(txdb_moth, k_moth, "GENEID", "TXNAME")
tx2gene_moth$TXNAME <- gsub("\\.[0-9]","",tx2gene_moth$TXNAME) 

## Import the quants
moth_count_data = tximport(files = moth_sample_files,
                           type = "kallisto",
                           tx2gene = tx2gene_moth,
                           ignoreTxVersion = T)
```

## Pre-filtering
```{r}
## quickly re-level the factors in the Age column to make young the control
moth_sample_table$Age <- relevel(moth_sample_table$Age, "young")
sapply(moth_sample_table, levels) # this checks the levels of the factors sapply()
moth_dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(moth_count_data, 
                                   colData = moth_sample_table, 
                                   design = ~ Sex + Age)

#I am using groups to test for interactions between Sex:Age in my data instead of putting this in my model matrix. This is a simpiler way of doing this as was explained in the Vignette - https://bioconductor.org/packages/devel/bioc/vignettes/DESeq2/inst/doc/DESeq2.html#interactions
colData(moth_dds)
moth_dds$group <- factor(paste0(moth_dds$Age, moth_dds$Sex))
design(moth_dds) <- ~ 0 + group
colData(moth_dds)


# now I am filtering
dim(moth_dds) # 14,542 genes before filtering
moth_smallestGroupSize <- 3
moth_keep <- rowSums(counts(moth_dds) >= 10) >= moth_smallestGroupSize
moth_dds <- moth_dds[moth_keep,]
dim(moth_dds) #  11,117 genes after filtering
```

## PCA 
```{r}
moth_vsd <- vst(moth_dds)
moth_pc12 <- plotPCA(moth_vsd, intgroup = c("Age", "Sex", "group"), returnData = T)

## new PCA that is colored the way I want
ggplot(moth_pc12, aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=Age)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Age), 
       colour="black",pch=21, size=3)  +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: 73% varience")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: 12% variance")) +
  ggtitle("P. interpunctella") +
  #coord_fixed() +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.95, geom = "polygon", alpha = 1/2, aes(fill = Age)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("young"="blue", "old"="orange")) + #only for Age 
  scale_color_manual(values=c("young"="blue", "old"="orange")) + #only for Age
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=18), 
        axis.title.x=element_text(size=18),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=18), 
        axis.title.y=element_text(size=18),
        legend.title = element_text(size=16),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.6, 'cm'),
        legend.position = c(0.91, 0.91)) #+
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-50,60))

```

## DESeq2
```{r}
moth_dds2 <- DESeq(moth_dds)
# resultsNames(moth_dds2)

colData(moth_dds)
summary(results(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0))
#malemoth_resSig <- subset(results(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "OldMale", "YoungMale"), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05)
malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05)


summary(results(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0))
#femmoth_resSig <- subset(results(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "OldFemale", "YoungFemale"), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05)
femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05)


# interactions (Ageold.Sexmale) changes are reflective of males
summary(results(moth_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)) 
#mothInt_resSig <- subset(results(moth_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05 )
mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05 )


malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink)
femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink)
mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink)
```

## Venn
```{r}
malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene = rownames(malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink)
femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene = rownames(femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink)
x_moth = list(Females = femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
ggvenn::ggvenn(x_moth,
     fill_color = c("darkgrey","white"),
     text_size = 6)


# Combine
mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene <- rownames(mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink)
x_mothAll = list(Females = femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
ggvenn::ggvenn(x_mothAll,
       fill_color = c("darkgrey","white","lightgrey"),
       text_size = 6)

# # Interaction (males vs females & old vs young)
# mothInt_resSigUP <- subset(mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink, mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink$log2FoldChange > 0) %>% rownames_to_column("gene")
# mothInt_resSigDown <- subset(mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink, mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink$log2FoldChange < 0) %>% rownames_to_column("gene")
# x_mothInt = list(upregulatedInAgeMales = mothInt_resSigUP$gene, downregulatedInAgeMales = mothInt_resSigDown$gene)
# ggvenn::ggvenn(x_mothInt,
#        fill_color = c("darkgrey","white"),
#        text_size = 6)



## This will give me the names of all the genes in each circle of the venns above and save them in an excel that is sheet separated
#install.packages("gplots")
library(gplots)
testLST_moth <- list(Females = femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
venn_objectMoth <- venn(testLST_moth, show.plot = F)
intersection_listMoth <- attributes(venn_objectMoth)$intersections
names(intersection_listMoth) <- names(intersection_listMoth) %>% gsub(":","_x_",.)
# write.xlsx(intersection_listMoth, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Results/VennTablesDEGs/VennTables_Pinterpunctella.xlsx")
```

## HeatMap
```{r}
M_age_moth <- malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink[c(6,2)]
names(M_age_moth)[2] = "Males"
F_age_moth <- femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink[c(6,2)]
names(F_age_moth)[2] = "Females"
mothAgeCommonDEGs <- merge(F_age_moth, M_age_moth, by="Gene") 

rownames(mothAgeCommonDEGs) = mothAgeCommonDEGs$Gene
mothAgeCommonDEGs <- mothAgeCommonDEGs[,-1]
data_moth <- as.matrix(mothAgeCommonDEGs)
colo = colorRamp2(c(-1, 0, 1), c("#005AB5", "black", "#DC3220")) # Sets the color of the heatmap
Heatmap(data_moth, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs P. interpunctella", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 2), width = unit(7, "cm"), cluster_columns = F)

# make one with no rowNames for consitent size
Heatmap(data_moth, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs P. interpunctella", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 8), width = unit(5, "cm"), cluster_columns = F, show_row_names = FALSE, height = unit(5, "cm"))




### First using the Venn in above code chunch I will get a list of the gene names that I am loking for
x_mothAll_Shared <- Venn(list(Females = femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)) %>% overlap()
## Next i will subset the data_fish object to only include the genes I just got a list of
data_moth2 <- as.matrix(mothAgeCommonDEGs[x_mothAll_Shared,])
## Then i will plot them
Heatmap(data_moth2, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs P. interpunctella", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 0.5), width = unit(5, "cm"), cluster_columns = F, show_row_names = T, height = unit(5, "cm"))

# write.xlsx(as.data.frame(data_moth2), file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Results/sharredAndInteractionDEGs(all)11_29_25.xlsx", sheetName = "P. interpunctella", row.names = T, append = T)
```

## (Int) Hierarchcal clustering
```{r}
rlog_out_moth <- rlog(moth_dds, blind = F)
mat1_moth <- assay(rlog_out_moth)[mothInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene,]
colnames(mat1_moth)
dfmoth <- as.data.frame(colData(moth_dds)[,c("Sex","Age")])
mothSampOrder <- order(dfmoth$Sex, dfmoth$Age)
mat1.scaled_moth <- t(apply(mat1_moth, 1, scale))
colnames(mat1.scaled_moth) <- colnames(mat1_moth)
dim(mat1.scaled_moth)
# define colors for annotations
annotationColorsList <- list(
  Age = c(young = "blue", old = "orange"),
  Sex = c(female = "#F8766D", male = "#00BFC4")
)
#graph
pheatmap(mat1.scaled_moth[, mothSampOrder], col = colo, name = "z-score", annotation_col = dfmoth, cluster_rows = T, cluster_cols = F, show_rownames = F, show_colnames = F, cutree_rows = 2, annotation_colors = annotationColorsList, main = "Interactions P. interpunctella")
```

## Gene Ontology (Gene-set enrichment analysis)
```{r}
# This is where we use the Org.Db that we made with AnnotationForge earlier
# This Org.db was saved to our computer
# below is how we install and use it (I will email it to you, just change your path)
#install.packages("/Users/school/Documents/UAB/UAB008/Org.dbs/org.Pinterpunctella.eg.db", repos=NULL, type="source")
library(org.Pinterpunctella.eg.db)
set.seed(1234)
### for males
malemoth_GO <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "OldMale", "YoungMale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
malemoth_GO <- as.data.frame(malemoth_GO)
malemoth_GO$Gene <- rownames(malemoth_GO)

original_gene_list_malemoth <- malemoth_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_malemoth) <- malemoth_GO$Gene
gene_list_malemoth<-na.omit(original_gene_list_malemoth)
gene_list_malemoth = sort(gene_list_malemoth, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_malemoth <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_malemoth, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Pinterpunctella.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#dotplot(gse_malemoth, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_malemoth, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Old Males", y="")

### for females
femmoth_GO <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "OldFemale", "YoungFemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
femmoth_GO <- as.data.frame(femmoth_GO)
femmoth_GO$Gene <- rownames(femmoth_GO)

original_gene_list_femmoth <- femmoth_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_femmoth) <- femmoth_GO$Gene
gene_list_femmoth<-na.omit(original_gene_list_femmoth)
gene_list_femmoth = sort(gene_list_femmoth, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_femmoth <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_femmoth, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Pinterpunctella.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#dotplot(gse_femmoth, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_femmoth, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Old Females", y="")

### for interactions
mothInt_GO <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
mothInt_GO <- as.data.frame(mothInt_GO)
mothInt_GO$Gene <- rownames(mothInt_GO)

original_gene_list_mothInt <- mothInt_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_mothInt) <- mothInt_GO$Gene
gene_list_mothInt<-na.omit(original_gene_list_mothInt)
gene_list_mothInt = sort(gene_list_mothInt, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_mothInt <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_mothInt, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Pinterpunctella.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#dotplot(gse_mothInt, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_mothInt, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Interaction", y="")
```

#### Compare together GO terms
```{r}
mlist <- list(gse_malemoth, gse_femmoth, gse_mothInt)
names(mlist) <- c("oldMales","oldFemales","Interaction")
mresults <- merge_result(mlist)
dotplot(mresults, showCategory=5, split=".sign", includeAll=T) +
  facet_grid(.~.sign) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1,)) +
  xlab("")

## let's try an upset and see what I get
maleMothInAge_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_malemoth)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "MaleNES"))
femaleMothInAge_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_femmoth)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "FemaleNES"))
interactionMoth_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_mothInt)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "InteractionNES"))

listInputs_1 <- list("Male_inAge" = maleMothInAge_GOterms$GO.term,
                     "Female_inAge" = femaleMothInAge_GOterms$GO.term,
                     "Interaction" =
                       interactionMoth_GOterms$GO.term)
upset(fromList(listInputs_1), sets = c("Interaction","Male_inAge","Female_inAge"), keep.order = T, order.by = "degree", mainbar.y.label = "Shared GO terms", sets.x.label = "Total GO terms")
```

## KEGG (Gene-set enichment analysis)
```{r}
# keytypes(org.Pinterpunctella.eg.db)
# head(keys(org.Pinterpunctella.eg.db, keytype="SYMBOL"))
## Gene-set enrichment analysis
## First let's join the ko terms we recived from GhostKawala for Plodia with our protein2tx2gene database we made earlier
PlodiaKOterms <- read.delim("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB008/KEGG/speciesSpecific_koTerms/moth_ko.txt", header = F, col.names = c("protein","ko")) %>% as.data.frame() %>% mutate(protein = gsub("\\.[0-9]","", protein)) 
gene2tx2protein2ko_moth <- full_join(gene2tx2protein_moth,PlodiaKOterms, by="protein")
View(gene2tx2protein_moth)
### for males
gene_list_malemoth_df <- as.data.frame(gene_list_malemoth) %>% rownames_to_column("gene") # 11,117 genes
malemoth_KEGG <- merge(gene_list_malemoth_df, gene2tx2protein2ko_moth, by="gene") #22,919 genes
malemoth_KEGG2 <- malemoth_KEGG[!duplicated(malemoth_KEGG$gene),] #10,758 genes
df_malemoth = malemoth_GO[malemoth_GO$Gene %in% malemoth_KEGG2$gene,]
df_malemoth$ko = malemoth_KEGG2$ko
maleMoth_keggGeneList <- df_malemoth$log2FoldChange
names(maleMoth_keggGeneList) <- df_malemoth$ko
maleMoth_keggGeneList <- na.omit(maleMoth_keggGeneList)
maleMoth_keggGeneList = sort(maleMoth_keggGeneList, decreasing = TRUE)


kk2_malemoth <- gseKEGG(geneList = maleMoth_keggGeneList,
               organism     = "ko",
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "kegg",
               seed = T)


dotplot(kk2_malemoth, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)

### for females
gene_list_femmoth_df <- as.data.frame(gene_list_femmoth) %>% rownames_to_column("gene") # 11,117 genes
femmoth_KEGG <- merge(gene_list_femmoth_df, gene2tx2protein2ko_moth, by="gene") #22,919 genes
femmoth_KEGG2 <- femmoth_KEGG[!duplicated(femmoth_KEGG$gene),] #10,758 genes
df_femmoth = femmoth_GO[femmoth_GO$Gene %in% femmoth_KEGG2$gene,]
df_femmoth$ko = femmoth_KEGG2$ko
femMoth_keggGeneList <- df_femmoth$log2FoldChange
names(femMoth_keggGeneList) <- df_femmoth$ko
femMoth_keggGeneList <- na.omit(femMoth_keggGeneList)
femMoth_keggGeneList = sort(femMoth_keggGeneList, decreasing = TRUE)

kk2_femmoth <- gseKEGG(geneList     = femMoth_keggGeneList,
               organism     = "ko",
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "kegg",
               seed = T)


dotplot(kk2_femmoth, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)


### for Interactions
gene_list_mothInt_df <- as.data.frame(gene_list_mothInt) %>% rownames_to_column("gene") # 11,117 genes
intMoth_KEGG <- merge(gene_list_mothInt_df, gene2tx2protein2ko_moth, by="gene") #22,919 genes
intMoth_KEGG2 <- intMoth_KEGG[!duplicated(intMoth_KEGG$gene),] #10,758 genes
df_intMoth = mothInt_GO[mothInt_GO$Gene %in% intMoth_KEGG2$gene,]
df_intMoth$ko = intMoth_KEGG2$ko
intMoth_keggGeneList <- df_intMoth$log2FoldChange
names(intMoth_keggGeneList) <- df_intMoth$ko
intMoth_keggGeneList <- na.omit(intMoth_keggGeneList)
intMoth_keggGeneList = sort(intMoth_keggGeneList, decreasing = TRUE)

kk2_intMoth <- gseKEGG(geneList     = intMoth_keggGeneList,
               organism     = "ko",
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "kegg",
               seed = T)


dotplot(kk2_intMoth, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)

################# COMBINE THE TWO GRAPHS ABOVE ############################
# mothList2 <- list(kk2_malemoth, kk2_femmoth)
# names(mothList2)<-c("Males","Females")
# mothResults2<-merge_result(mothList2)
# dotplot(mothResults2, showCategory=5, split=".sign", includeAll=T) + facet_grid(.~.sign)
```

#### Compare together KEGG Pathways
```{r}
mlist <- list(kk2_malemoth, kk2_femmoth, kk2_intMoth)
names(mlist) <- c("oldMales","oldFemales","Interaction")
mresults <- merge_result(mlist)
dotplot(mresults, showCategory=5, split=".sign", includeAll=T) +
  facet_grid(.~.sign) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1,)) +
  xlab("")

## let's try an upset and see what I get
maleMothInAge_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_malemoth)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "MaleNES"))
femaleMothInAge_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_femmoth)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "FemaleNES"))
interactionMoth_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_intMoth)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "InteractionNES"))

listInputs_1 <- list("Male_inAge" = maleMothInAge_KEGG$KEGG.pathway,
                     "Female_inAge" = femaleMothInAge_KEGG$KEGG.pathway,
                     "Interaction" =
                       interactionMoth_KEGG$KEGG.pathway)
upset(fromList(listInputs_1), sets = c("Interaction","Male_inAge","Female_inAge"), keep.order = T, order.by = "degree", mainbar.y.label = "Shared KEGG Pathways", sets.x.label = "Total KEGG Pathways")
```

#---------------------------
#killfish (N furzeri)
##Importing data
```{r}
killifish_sample_table = read.xlsx("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Metatdata/killifishMetadata.xlsx", sheetIndex = 1, header = T, stringsAsFactors = T)
row.names(killifish_sample_table)=killifish_sample_table$SRA
print(names(killifish_sample_table))
names(killifish_sample_table)[3:4] <- toTitleCase(names(killifish_sample_table)[3:4]) # this capitalizes "age" and "sex"
print(names(killifish_sample_table)) # just checking to make sure it worked

killifish_sample_files = paste0("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Quants/killifishQuants/",
                           pull(killifish_sample_table, SRA), '/abundance.tsv')
names(killifish_sample_files) = pull(killifish_sample_table, SRA)
all(file.exists(killifish_sample_files))
data.frame(thefiles = killifish_sample_files, doihave = file.exists(killifish_sample_files))
## make a tx2gene object
#killifish_tx2gene = gene2tx2protein_killifish %>% select(transcript,gene) ## Error after tximport: transcripts missing from tx2gene: 7760

txdb_killifish <- makeTxDbFromGFF("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/genomes/Nothobranchius_furzeri_GRZkillifish/ncbi_dataset/data/GCF_027789165.1/genomic.gff",
                        format = "gff",
                        organism = "Nothobranchius furzeri")
k_killifish <- keys(txdb_killifish, keytype = "TXNAME")
tx2gene_killifish <- AnnotationDbi::select(txdb_killifish, k_killifish, "GENEID", "TXNAME")
tx2gene_killifish$TXNAME <- gsub("\\.[0-9]","",tx2gene_killifish$TXNAME) #no error from tximport

killifish_count_data = tximport(files = killifish_sample_files,
                           type = "kallisto",
                           tx2gene = tx2gene_killifish,
                           ignoreTxVersion = T)
```

## Pre-filtering
```{r}
## quickly re-level the factors in the Age column to make young the control
killifish_sample_table$Age <- relevel(killifish_sample_table$Age, "young")
sapply(killifish_sample_table, levels) # this checks the levels of the factors sapply()
killifish_dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(killifish_count_data, 
                                   colData = killifish_sample_table, 
                                   design = ~ Sex + Age)

#I am using groups to test for interactions between Sex:Age in my data instead of putting this in my model matrix. This is a simpiler way of doing this as was explained in the Vignette - https://bioconductor.org/packages/devel/bioc/vignettes/DESeq2/inst/doc/DESeq2.html#interactions
colData(killifish_dds)
killifish_dds$group <- factor(paste0(killifish_dds$Age, killifish_dds$Sex))
design(killifish_dds) <- ~ 0 + group
colData(killifish_dds)


# now I am filtering
dim(killifish_dds) # 29,503 genes before filtering
killifish_smallestGroupSize <- 4
killifish_keep <- rowSums(counts(killifish_dds) >= 10) >= killifish_smallestGroupSize
killifish_dds <- killifish_dds[killifish_keep,]
dim(killifish_dds) # 18,418 genes after filtering
```

## PCA 
```{r}
killifish_vsd <- vst(killifish_dds)
killifish_pc12 <- plotPCA(killifish_vsd, intgroup = c("Age", "Sex", "group"), returnData = T)

## new PCA that is colored the way I want
ggplot(killifish_pc12, aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=Age)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Age), 
       colour="black",pch=21, size=3)  +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: 39% varience")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: 9% variance")) +
  ggtitle("N. furzeri") +
  #coord_fixed() +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.95, geom = "polygon", alpha = 1/2, aes(fill = Age)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("young"="blue", "old"="orange")) + #only for Age 
  scale_color_manual(values=c("young"="blue", "old"="orange")) + #only for Age
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=18), 
        axis.title.x=element_text(size=18),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=18), 
        axis.title.y=element_text(size=18),
        legend.title = element_text(size=16),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.6, 'cm'),
        legend.position = c(0.91, 0.91)) #+
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-50,60))
```

## DESeq2
```{r}
killifish_dds2 <- DESeq(killifish_dds)
resultsNames(killifish_dds2)

colData(killifish_dds)
summary(results(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0))
#malekillifish_resSig <- subset(results(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05)
malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05)


summary(results(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0))
#femkillifish_resSig <- subset(results(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05)
femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05)


# interactions (Ageold.Sexmale) changes are reflective of males
summary(results(killifish_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)) 
#killifishInt_resSig <- subset(results(killifish_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05 )
killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05 )


malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink)
femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink)
killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink)
```

## Venn
```{r}
malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene = rownames(malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink)
femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene = rownames(femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink)
x_killifish = list(Females = femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
ggvenn::ggvenn(x_killifish,
     fill_color = c("darkgrey","white"),
     text_size = 6)


# Combine
killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene <- rownames(killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink)
x_killifishAll = list(Females = femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
ggvenn::ggvenn(x_killifishAll,
       fill_color = c("darkgrey","white","lightgrey"),
       text_size = 6)

# # Interaction (males vs females & old vs young)
# killifishInt_resSigUP <- subset(killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink, killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink$log2FoldChange > 0) %>% rownames_to_column("gene")
# killifishInt_resSigDown <- subset(killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink, killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink$log2FoldChange < 0) %>% rownames_to_column("gene")
# x_killifishInt = list(upregulatedInAgeMales = killifishInt_resSigUP$gene, downregulatedInAgeMales = killifishInt_resSigDown$gene)
# ggvenn::ggvenn(x_killifishInt,
#        fill_color = c("darkgrey","white"),
#        text_size = 6)



## This will give me the names of all the genes in each circle of the venns above and save them in an excel that is sheet separated
#install.packages("gplots")
library(gplots)
testLST_killifish <- list(Females = femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
venn_objectKillifish <- venn(testLST_killifish, show.plot = F)
intersection_listKillifish <- attributes(venn_objectKillifish)$intersections
names(intersection_listKillifish) <- names(intersection_listKillifish) %>% gsub(":","_x_",.)
# write.xlsx(intersection_listKillifish, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Results/VennTablesDEGs/VennTables_Nfurzeri.xlsx")
```

## HeatMap
```{r}
M_age_killifish <- malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink[c(6,2)]
names(M_age_killifish)[2] = "Males"
F_age_killifish <- femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink[c(6,2)]
names(F_age_killifish)[2] = "Females"
killifishAgeCommonDEGs <- merge(F_age_killifish, M_age_killifish, by="Gene") 

rownames(killifishAgeCommonDEGs) = killifishAgeCommonDEGs$Gene
killifishAgeCommonDEGs <- killifishAgeCommonDEGs[,-1]
data_killifish <- as.matrix(killifishAgeCommonDEGs)
colo = colorRamp2(c(-1, 0, 1), c("#005AB5", "black", "#DC3220")) # Sets the color of the heatmap
Heatmap(data_killifish, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs N. furzeri", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 5), width = unit(7, "cm"), cluster_columns = F)

# make one with no rowNames for consitent size
Heatmap(data_killifish, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs N. furzeri", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 8), width = unit(5, "cm"), cluster_columns = F, show_row_names = FALSE, height = unit(5, "cm"))





### First using the Venn in above code chunch I will get a list of the gene names that I am loking for
x_killifishAll_Shared <- Venn(list(Females = femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)) %>% overlap()
## Next i will subset the data_fish object to only include the genes I just got a list of
data_killifish2 <- as.matrix(killifishAgeCommonDEGs[x_killifishAll_Shared,])
## Then i will plot them
Heatmap(data_killifish2, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs N. furzeri", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 8), width = unit(5, "cm"), cluster_columns = F, show_row_names = T, height = unit(5, "cm"))

# write.xlsx(as.data.frame(data_killifish2), file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Results/sharredAndInteractionDEGs(all)11_29_25.xlsx", sheetName = "N. furzeri", row.names = T, append = T)
```

## (Int) Hierarchcal clustering
```{r}
rlog_out_killifish <- rlog(killifish_dds, blind = F)
mat1_killifish <- assay(rlog_out_killifish)[killifishInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene,]
colnames(mat1_killifish)
dfkillifish <- as.data.frame(colData(killifish_dds)[,c("Sex","Age")])
killifishSampOrder <- order(dfkillifish$Sex, dfkillifish$Age)
mat1.scaled_killifish <- t(apply(mat1_killifish, 1, scale))
colnames(mat1.scaled_killifish) <- colnames(mat1_killifish)
dim(mat1.scaled_killifish)
# define colors for annotations
annotationColorsList <- list(
  Age = c(young = "blue", old = "orange"),
  Sex = c(female = "#F8766D", male = "#00BFC4")
)
#graph
pheatmap(mat1.scaled_killifish[, killifishSampOrder], col = colo, name = "z-score", annotation_col = dfkillifish, cluster_rows = T, cluster_cols = F, show_rownames = F, show_colnames = F, cutree_rows = 2, annotation_colors = annotationColorsList, main = "Interactions N. furzeri")
```

## Gene Ontology (Gene-set enrichment analysis)
```{r}
# install.packages("/Users/school/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Org.dbs/org.Nfurzeri.eg.db", repos=NULL, type="source")
library(org.Nfurzeri.eg.db)
set.seed(1234)
### for males
maleKillifish_GO <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
maleKillifish_GO <- as.data.frame(maleKillifish_GO)
maleKillifish_GO$Gene <- rownames(maleKillifish_GO)

original_gene_list_maleKillifish <- maleKillifish_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_maleKillifish) <- maleKillifish_GO$Gene
gene_list_maleKillifish<-na.omit(original_gene_list_maleKillifish)
gene_list_maleKillifish = sort(gene_list_maleKillifish, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_maleKillifish <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_maleKillifish, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Nfurzeri.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#dotplot(gse_maleKillifish, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_maleKillifish, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Old Males", y="")

### for females
femKillifish_GO <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
femKillifish_GO <- as.data.frame(femKillifish_GO)
femKillifish_GO$Gene <- rownames(femKillifish_GO)

original_gene_list_femKillifish <- femKillifish_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_femKillifish) <- femKillifish_GO$Gene
gene_list_femKillifish<-na.omit(original_gene_list_femKillifish)
gene_list_femKillifish = sort(gene_list_femKillifish, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_femKillifish <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_femKillifish, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Nfurzeri.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#dotplot(gse_femKillifish, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_femKillifish, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Old Females", y="")

### for interactions
killifishInt_GO <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
killifishInt_GO <- as.data.frame(killifishInt_GO)
killifishInt_GO$Gene <- rownames(killifishInt_GO)

original_gene_list_killifishInt <- killifishInt_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_killifishInt) <- killifishInt_GO$Gene
gene_list_killifishInt<-na.omit(original_gene_list_killifishInt)
gene_list_killifishInt = sort(gene_list_killifishInt, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_killifishInt <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_killifishInt, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Nfurzeri.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#dotplot(gse_killifishInt, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_killifishInt, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Interaction", y="")
```

#### Compare together GO terms
```{r}
mlist <- list(gse_maleKillifish, gse_femKillifish, gse_killifishInt)
names(mlist) <- c("oldMales","oldFemales","Interaction")
mresults <- merge_result(mlist)
dotplot(mresults, showCategory=5, split=".sign", includeAll=T) +
  facet_grid(.~.sign) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1,)) +
  xlab("")

## let's try an upset and see what I get
maleKillifishInAge_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_maleKillifish)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "MaleNES"))
femaleKillifishInAge_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_femKillifish)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "FemaleNES"))
interactionKillifish_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_killifishInt)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "InteractionNES"))

listInputs_1 <- list("Male_inAge" = maleKillifishInAge_GOterms$GO.term,
                     "Female_inAge" = femaleKillifishInAge_GOterms$GO.term,
                     "Interaction" =
                       interactionKillifish_GOterms$GO.term)
upset(fromList(listInputs_1), sets = c("Interaction","Male_inAge","Female_inAge"), keep.order = T, order.by = "degree", mainbar.y.label = "Shared GO terms", sets.x.label = "Total GO terms")
```

## KEGG (Gene-set enichment analysis)
```{r}
## Gene-set enrichment analysis
### for males
maleKillifish_ids<-bitr(names(original_gene_list_maleKillifish), fromType = "SYMBOL", 
                   toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Nfurzeri.eg.db")
dedup_ids_maleKillifish = maleKillifish_ids[!duplicated(maleKillifish_ids[c("SYMBOL")]),]
maleKillifish_GO2 = maleKillifish_GO[maleKillifish_GO$Gene %in% dedup_ids_maleKillifish$SYMBOL,]
maleKillifish_GO2$Y = dedup_ids_maleKillifish$ENTREZID
kegg_gene_list_maleKillifish <- maleKillifish_GO2$log2FoldChange
names(kegg_gene_list_maleKillifish) <- maleKillifish_GO2$Y
kegg_gene_list_maleKillifish<-na.omit(kegg_gene_list_maleKillifish)
kegg_gene_list_maleKillifish = sort(kegg_gene_list_maleKillifish, decreasing = TRUE)

kegg_organism = "nfu"
kk2_maleKillifish <- gseKEGG(geneList     = kegg_gene_list_maleKillifish,
               organism     = kegg_organism,
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "ncbi-geneid",
               seed = T)


dotplot(kk2_maleKillifish, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)

### for females
femKillifish_ids<-bitr(names(original_gene_list_femKillifish), fromType = "SYMBOL", 
                   toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Nfurzeri.eg.db")
dedup_ids_femKillifish = femKillifish_ids[!duplicated(femKillifish_ids[c("SYMBOL")]),]
femKillifish_GO2 = femKillifish_GO[femKillifish_GO$Gene %in% dedup_ids_femKillifish$SYMBOL,]
femKillifish_GO2$Y = dedup_ids_femKillifish$ENTREZID
kegg_gene_list_femKillifish <- femKillifish_GO2$log2FoldChange
names(kegg_gene_list_femKillifish) <- femKillifish_GO2$Y
kegg_gene_list_femKillifish<-na.omit(kegg_gene_list_femKillifish)
kegg_gene_list_femKillifish = sort(kegg_gene_list_femKillifish, decreasing = TRUE)

kegg_organism = "nfu"
kk2_femKillifish <- gseKEGG(geneList     = kegg_gene_list_femKillifish,
               organism     = kegg_organism,
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "ncbi-geneid",
               seed = T)


dotplot(kk2_femKillifish, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)


### for Interactions
killifishInt_ids<-bitr(names(original_gene_list_killifishInt), fromType = "SYMBOL", 
                   toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Nfurzeri.eg.db")
dedup_ids_killifishInt = killifishInt_ids[!duplicated(killifishInt_ids[c("SYMBOL")]),]
killifishInt_GO2 = killifishInt_GO[killifishInt_GO$Gene %in% dedup_ids_killifishInt$SYMBOL,]
killifishInt_GO2$Y = dedup_ids_killifishInt$ENTREZID
kegg_gene_list_killifishInt <- killifishInt_GO2$log2FoldChange
names(kegg_gene_list_killifishInt) <- killifishInt_GO2$Y
kegg_gene_list_killifishInt<-na.omit(kegg_gene_list_killifishInt)
kegg_gene_list_killifishInt = sort(kegg_gene_list_killifishInt, decreasing = TRUE)

kegg_organism = "nfu"
kk2_killifishInt <- gseKEGG(geneList     = kegg_gene_list_killifishInt,
               organism     = kegg_organism,
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "ncbi-geneid",
               seed = T)


dotplot(kk2_killifishInt, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
```

#### Compare together KEGG Pathways
```{r}
mlist <- list(kk2_maleKillifish, kk2_femKillifish, kk2_killifishInt)
names(mlist) <- c("oldMales","oldFemales","Interaction")
mresults <- merge_result(mlist)
dotplot(mresults, showCategory=5, split=".sign", includeAll=T) +
  facet_grid(.~.sign) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1,)) +
  xlab("")

## let's try an upset and see what I get
maleKillifishInAge_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_maleKillifish)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "MaleNES"))
femaleKillifishInAge_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_femKillifish)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "FemaleNES"))
interactionKillifish_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_killifishInt)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "InteractionNES"))

listInputs_1 <- list("Male_inAge" = maleKillifishInAge_KEGG$KEGG.pathway,
                     "Female_inAge" = femaleKillifishInAge_KEGG$KEGG.pathway,
                     "Interaction" =
                       interactionKillifish_KEGG$KEGG.pathway)
upset(fromList(listInputs_1), sets = c("Interaction","Male_inAge","Female_inAge"), keep.order = T, order.by = "degree", mainbar.y.label = "Shared KEGG Pathways", sets.x.label = "Total KEGG Pathways")
```

#---------------------------
#rat (R norvegicus)
##Importing data
```{r}
rat_sample_table = read.xlsx("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Metatdata/ratMetadata.xlsx", sheetIndex = 3, header = T, stringsAsFactors = T)
row.names(rat_sample_table)=rat_sample_table$ID
print(names(rat_sample_table))
names(rat_sample_table)[3:4] <- toTitleCase(names(rat_sample_table)[3:4]) # this capitalizes "age" and "sex"
print(names(rat_sample_table)) # just checking to make sure it worked

rat_sample_files = paste0("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Quants/ratQuants_NewUsing6weekYoungRats_/",
                           pull(rat_sample_table, ID), '/abundance.tsv')
names(rat_sample_files) = pull(rat_sample_table, ID)
all(file.exists(rat_sample_files))
data.frame(thefiles = rat_sample_files, doihave = file.exists(rat_sample_files))
## make a tx2gene object
#rat_tx2gene = gene2tx2protein_rat %>% select(transcript,gene) ## Error after tximport: transcripts missing from tx2gene: 29,149

txdb_rat <- makeTxDbFromGFF("/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/genomes/rattus_norvegicus_Fischer344/ncbi_dataset/data/GCF_036323735.1/genomic.gff",
                        format = "gff",
                        organism = "Rattus norvegicus")
k_rat <- keys(txdb_rat, keytype = "TXNAME")
tx2gene_rat <- AnnotationDbi::select(txdb_rat, k_rat, "GENEID", "TXNAME")
tx2gene_rat$TXNAME <- gsub("\\.[0-9]","",tx2gene_rat$TXNAME) #error from tximport: transcripts missing from tx2gene: 112

## Import the quants
rat_count_data = tximport(files = rat_sample_files,
                           type = "kallisto",
                           tx2gene = tx2gene_rat,
                           ignoreTxVersion = T)
```

## Pre-filtering
```{r}
## quickly re-level the factors in the Age column to make young the control
rat_sample_table$Age <- relevel(rat_sample_table$Age, "young")
sapply(rat_sample_table, levels) # this checks the levels of the factors sapply()
rat_dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(rat_count_data, 
                                   colData = rat_sample_table, 
                                   design = ~ Sex + Age)

#I am using groups to test for interactions between Sex:Age in my data instead of putting this in my model matrix. This is a simpiler way of doing this as was explained in the Vignette - https://bioconductor.org/packages/devel/bioc/vignettes/DESeq2/inst/doc/DESeq2.html#interactions
colData(rat_dds)
rat_dds$group <- factor(paste0(rat_dds$Age, rat_dds$Sex))
design(rat_dds) <- ~ 0 + group
colData(rat_dds)


# now I am filtering
dim(rat_dds) # 37,386 genes before filtering
rat_smallestGroupSize <- 4
rat_keep <- rowSums(counts(rat_dds) >= 10) >= rat_smallestGroupSize
rat_dds <- rat_dds[rat_keep,]
dim(rat_dds) # 19,732 genes after filtering

```

## PCA 
```{r}
rat_vsd <- vst(rat_dds)
rat_pc12 <- plotPCA(rat_vsd, intgroup = c("Age", "Sex", "group"), returnData = T)

## new PCA that is colored the way I want
ggplot(rat_pc12, aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=Age)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Age), 
       colour="black",pch=21, size=3)  +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: 62% varience")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: 14% variance")) +
  ggtitle("R. norvegicus") +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.95, geom = "polygon", alpha = 1/2, aes(fill = Age)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("young"="blue", "old"="orange")) + #only for Age 
  scale_color_manual(values=c("young"="blue", "old"="orange")) + #only for Age
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(size=18), 
        axis.title.x=element_text(size=18),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=18), 
        axis.title.y=element_text(size=18),
        legend.title = element_text(size=16),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.6, 'cm'),
        legend.position = c(0.91, 0.91)) #+
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-50,60))
```

## DESeq2
```{r}
rat_dds2 <- DESeq(rat_dds)
resultsNames(rat_dds2)

colData(rat_dds)
summary(results(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0))
#malerat_resSig <- subset(results(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05)
malerat_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05)


summary(results(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0))
#femrat_resSig <- subset(results(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05)
femrat_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05)


# interactions (Ageold.Sexmale) changes are reflective of males
summary(results(rat_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)) 
#ratInt_resSig <- subset(results(rat_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), lfcThreshold = 0), padj < 0.05 )
ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), type = "ashr") %>% subset(padj < 0.05 )


malerat_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(malerat_resSig_lfcShrink)
femrat_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(femrat_resSig_lfcShrink)
ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink <- as.data.frame(ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink)
```

## Venn
```{r}
malerat_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene = rownames(malerat_resSig_lfcShrink)
femrat_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene = rownames(femrat_resSig_lfcShrink)
x_rat = list(Females = femrat_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malerat_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
ggvenn::ggvenn(x_rat,
     fill_color = c("darkgrey","white"),
     text_size = 6)


# Combine
ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene <- rownames(ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink)
x_ratAll = list(Females = femrat_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malerat_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
ggvenn::ggvenn(x_ratAll,
       fill_color = c("darkgrey","white","lightgrey"),
       text_size = 6)

# # Interaction (males vs females & old vs young)
# ratInt_resSigUP <- subset(ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink, ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink$log2FoldChange > 0) %>% rownames_to_column("gene")
# ratInt_resSigDown <- subset(ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink, ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink$log2FoldChange < 0) %>% rownames_to_column("gene")
# x_ratInt = list(upregulatedInAgeMales = ratInt_resSigUP$gene, downregulatedInAgeMales = ratInt_resSigDown$gene)
# ggvenn::ggvenn(x_ratInt,
#        fill_color = c("darkgrey","white"),
#        text_size = 6)



## This will give me the names of all the genes in each circle of the venns above and save them in an excel that is sheet separated
#install.packages("gplots")
library(gplots)
testLST_rat <- list(Females = femrat_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malerat_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)
venn_objectRat <- venn(testLST_rat, show.plot = F)
intersection_listRat <- attributes(venn_objectRat)$intersections
names(intersection_listRat) <- names(intersection_listRat) %>% gsub(":","_x_",.)
# write.xlsx(intersection_listRat, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Results/VennTablesDEGs/VennTables_Rnorvegicus.xlsx")
```

## HeatMap
```{r}
M_age_rat <- malerat_resSig_lfcShrink[c(6,2)]
names(M_age_rat)[2] = "Males"
F_age_rat <- femrat_resSig_lfcShrink[c(6,2)]
names(F_age_rat)[2] = "Females"
ratAgeCommonDEGs <- merge(F_age_rat, M_age_rat, by="Gene") 

rownames(ratAgeCommonDEGs) = ratAgeCommonDEGs$Gene
ratAgeCommonDEGs <- ratAgeCommonDEGs[,-1]
data_rat <- as.matrix(ratAgeCommonDEGs)
colo = colorRamp2(c(-1, 0, 1), c("#005AB5", "black", "#DC3220")) # Sets the color of the heatmap
Heatmap(data_rat, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs R. novegicus", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 2), width = unit(7, "cm"), cluster_columns = F)

# make one with no rowNames for consitent size
Heatmap(data_rat, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs R. novegicus", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 8), width = unit(5, "cm"), cluster_columns = F, show_row_names = FALSE, height = unit(5, "cm"))



### First using the Venn in above code chunch I will get a list of the gene names that I am loking for
x_ratAll_Shared <- Venn(list(Females = femrat_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Males = malerat_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene, Interaction = ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene)) %>% overlap()
## Next i will subset the data_fish object to only include the genes I just got a list of
data_rat2 <- as.matrix(ratAgeCommonDEGs[x_ratAll_Shared,])
## Then i will plot them
Heatmap(data_rat2, col = colo, name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "Age DEGs R. norvegicus", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 8), width = unit(5, "cm"), cluster_columns = F, show_row_names = T, height = unit(5, "cm"))

# write.xlsx(as.data.frame(data_rat2), file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Results/sharredAndInteractionDEGs(all)11_29_25.xlsx", sheetName = "R. norvegicus", row.names = T, append = T)
```

## (Int) Hierarchcal clustering
```{r}
rlog_out_rat <- rlog(rat_dds, blind = F)
mat1_rat <- assay(rlog_out_rat)[ratInt_resSig_lfcShrink$Gene,]
colnames(mat1_rat)
dfrat <- as.data.frame(colData(rat_dds)[,c("Sex","Age")])
ratSampOrder <- order(dfrat$Sex, dfrat$Age)
mat1.scaled_rat <- t(apply(mat1_rat, 1, scale))
colnames(mat1.scaled_rat) <- colnames(mat1_rat)
dim(mat1.scaled_rat)
# define colors for annotations
annotationColorsList <- list(
  Age = c(young = "blue", old = "orange"),
  Sex = c(female = "#F8766D", male = "#00BFC4")
)
#graph
pheatmap(mat1.scaled_rat[, ratSampOrder], col = colo, name = "z-score", annotation_col = dfrat, cluster_rows = T, cluster_cols = F, show_rownames = F, show_colnames = F, cutree_rows = 2, annotation_colors = annotationColorsList, main = "Interactions R. norvegicus")
```

## Gene Ontology (Gene-set enrichment analysis)
```{r}
# install.packages("org.Rn.eg.db")
# BiocManager::install("org.Rn.eg.db")
library(org.Rn.eg.db)
set.seed(1234)
### for males
maleRat_GO <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
maleRat_GO <- as.data.frame(maleRat_GO)
maleRat_GO$Gene <- rownames(maleRat_GO)

original_gene_list_maleRat <- maleRat_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_maleRat) <- maleRat_GO$Gene
gene_list_maleRat<-na.omit(original_gene_list_maleRat)
gene_list_maleRat = sort(gene_list_maleRat, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_maleRat <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_maleRat, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Rn.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#dotplot(gse_maleRat, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_maleRat, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Old Males", y="")

### for females
femRat_GO <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
femRat_GO <- as.data.frame(femRat_GO)
femRat_GO$Gene <- rownames(femRat_GO)

original_gene_list_femRat <- femRat_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_femRat) <- femRat_GO$Gene
gene_list_femRat<-na.omit(original_gene_list_femRat)
gene_list_femRat = sort(gene_list_femRat, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_femRat <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_femRat, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Rn.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#dotplot(gse_femRat, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_femRat, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Old Females", y="")

### for interactions
ratInt_GO <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c(-1,1,1,-1), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0)
ratInt_GO <- as.data.frame(ratInt_GO)
ratInt_GO$Gene <- rownames(ratInt_GO)

original_gene_list_ratInt <- ratInt_GO$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list_ratInt) <- ratInt_GO$Gene
gene_list_ratInt<-na.omit(original_gene_list_ratInt)
gene_list_ratInt = sort(gene_list_ratInt, decreasing = TRUE)

gse_ratInt <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list_ratInt, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Rn.eg.db, 
             pAdjustMethod = "none",
             seed = T)

#dotplot(gse_ratInt, showCategory=10, split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
ggplot(gse_ratInt, showCategory=10, split="ONTOLOGY", aes(x = NES, y = Description, fill=qvalue)) +
  geom_col() + facet_grid(ONTOLOGY~., scale="free") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color="black")) + 
  labs(title = "Interaction", y="")
```

#### Compare together GO terms
```{r}
mlist <- list(gse_maleRat, gse_femRat, gse_ratInt)
names(mlist) <- c("oldMales","oldFemales","Interaction")
mresults <- merge_result(mlist)
dotplot(mresults, showCategory=5, split=".sign", includeAll=T) +
  facet_grid(.~.sign) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1,)) +
  xlab("")

## let's try an upset and see what I get
maleRatInAge_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_maleRat)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "MaleNES"))
femaleRatInAge_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_femRat)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "FemaleNES"))
interactionRat_GOterms <- as.data.frame(gse_ratInt)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("GO.term", "InteractionNES"))

listInputs_1 <- list("Male_inAge" = maleRatInAge_GOterms$GO.term,
                     "Female_inAge" = femaleRatInAge_GOterms$GO.term,
                     "Interaction" =
                       interactionRat_GOterms$GO.term)
upset(fromList(listInputs_1), sets = c("Interaction","Male_inAge","Female_inAge"), keep.order = T, order.by = "degree", mainbar.y.label = "Shared GO terms", sets.x.label = "Total GO terms")
```

## KEGG (Gene-set enichment analysis)
```{r}
## Gene-set enrichment analysis
### for males
maleRat_ids<-bitr(names(original_gene_list_maleRat), fromType = "SYMBOL", 
                   toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Rn.eg.db")
dedup_ids_maleRat = maleRat_ids[!duplicated(maleRat_ids[c("SYMBOL")]),]
maleRat_GO2 = maleRat_GO[maleRat_GO$Gene %in% dedup_ids_maleRat$SYMBOL,]
maleRat_GO2$Y = dedup_ids_maleRat$ENTREZID
kegg_gene_list_maleRat <- maleRat_GO2$log2FoldChange
names(kegg_gene_list_maleRat) <- maleRat_GO2$Y
kegg_gene_list_maleRat<-na.omit(kegg_gene_list_maleRat)
kegg_gene_list_maleRat = sort(kegg_gene_list_maleRat, decreasing = TRUE)

kegg_organism = "rno"
kk2_maleRat <- gseKEGG(geneList     = kegg_gene_list_maleRat,
               organism     = kegg_organism,
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "ncbi-geneid",
               seed = T)


dotplot(kk2_maleRat, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)

### for females
femRat_ids<-bitr(names(original_gene_list_femRat), fromType = "SYMBOL", 
                   toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Rn.eg.db")
dedup_ids_femRat = femRat_ids[!duplicated(femRat_ids[c("SYMBOL")]),]
femRat_GO2 = femRat_GO[femRat_GO$Gene %in% dedup_ids_femRat$SYMBOL,]
femRat_GO2$Y = dedup_ids_femRat$ENTREZID
kegg_gene_list_femRat <- femRat_GO2$log2FoldChange
names(kegg_gene_list_femRat) <- femRat_GO2$Y
kegg_gene_list_femRat<-na.omit(kegg_gene_list_femRat)
kegg_gene_list_femRat = sort(kegg_gene_list_femRat, decreasing = TRUE)

kegg_organism = "rno"
kk2_femRat <- gseKEGG(geneList     = kegg_gene_list_femRat,
               organism     = kegg_organism,
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "ncbi-geneid",
               seed = T)


dotplot(kk2_femRat, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)


### for Interactions
ratInt_ids<-bitr(names(original_gene_list_ratInt), fromType = "SYMBOL", 
                   toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Rn.eg.db")
dedup_ids_ratInt = ratInt_ids[!duplicated(ratInt_ids[c("SYMBOL")]),]
ratInt_GO2 = ratInt_GO[ratInt_GO$Gene %in% dedup_ids_ratInt$SYMBOL,]
ratInt_GO2$Y = dedup_ids_ratInt$ENTREZID
kegg_gene_list_ratInt <- ratInt_GO2$log2FoldChange
names(kegg_gene_list_ratInt) <- ratInt_GO2$Y
kegg_gene_list_ratInt<-na.omit(kegg_gene_list_ratInt)
kegg_gene_list_ratInt = sort(kegg_gene_list_ratInt, decreasing = TRUE)

kegg_organism = "rno"
kk2_ratInt <- gseKEGG(geneList     = kegg_gene_list_ratInt,
               organism     = kegg_organism,
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 3,
               maxGSSize    = 800,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "ncbi-geneid",
               seed = T)


dotplot(kk2_ratInt, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
```

#### Compare together KEGG Pathways
```{r}
mlist <- list(kk2_maleRat, kk2_femRat, kk2_ratInt)
names(mlist) <- c("oldMales","oldFemales","Interaction")
mresults <- merge_result(mlist)
dotplot(mresults, showCategory=5, split=".sign", includeAll=T) +
  facet_grid(.~.sign) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1,)) +
  xlab("")

## let's try an upset and see what I get
maleRatInAge_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_maleRat)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "MaleNES"))
femaleRatInAge_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_femRat)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "FemaleNES"))
interactionRat_KEGG <- as.data.frame(kk2_ratInt)[,c(3,6)] %>% 'rownames<-'(NULL) %>% set_names(c("KEGG.pathway", "InteractionNES"))
```
