```{r}
                                             %in% actin_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(actin_femD.melanogaster, actin_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(actin_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(actin_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(actin_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(actin_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(actin_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(actin_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(actin_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(actin_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(actin_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(actin_maleH.sapiens) -> allActinExpression
#View(allActinExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allActinExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/bothSexes/OG0000027/allActinExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000027", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allActinExpression$organism <- factor(allActinExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_actin <- allActinExpression[allActinExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_actin <- allActinExpression[allActinExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allActinExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_actin, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_actin, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the Actin orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```
####### heatmap
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr) # For pivot_longer if needed

# Example data
set.seed(123)
df <- data.frame(
  Cell = paste("Cell", 1:10),
  X_Axis_Category = sample(c("GroupA", "GroupB"), 10, replace = TRUE),
  Value = rnorm(10),
  Order_Value = sample(1:10, 10, replace = FALSE) # This is the column to order by
)

df_ordered <- df %>%
  arrange(Order_Value) %>%
  mutate(Cell = factor(Cell, levels = unique(Cell)))

levels(df_ordered$Cell)

ggplot(df_ordered, aes(x = X_Axis_Category, y = Cell, fill = Value)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", lwd = 0.5, linetype = 1) + # geom_tile creates the heatmap cells
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "blue", high = "red") + # Customize the color scale
  labs(
    title = "Heatmap ordered by a specific column",
    x = "X Axis Category",
    y = "Cell (Ordered)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


hmTest <- allActinExpression
# Make Sex a factor
hmTest <- hmTest %>%
  mutate(Sex = factor(Sex)) 

levels(hmTest$Sex)

hmTest_females <- hmTest[hmTest$Sex == "female",]
hmTest_females2 <- hmTest_females[c(1,3)]  
names(hmTest_females2)[2] = "Females"

# View(hmTest_females)
# View(hmTest) #same order, good!

hmTest_males <- hmTest[hmTest$Sex == "male",]
hmTest_males2 <- hmTest_males[c(1,3)]  
names(hmTest_males2)[2] = "Males" 

hmTest_bothSexes <- merge(hmTest_females2, hmTest_males2, by="gene_protein") # using merge() alphebatized the genes (I did not want this)
# I will try left_join() instead
hmTest_bothSexes <- left_join(hmTest_females2, hmTest_males2, by="gene_protein")


rownames(hmTest_bothSexes) = hmTest_bothSexes$gene_protein
hmTest_bothSexes <- hmTest_bothSexes[,-1]
hmTest_bothSexes <- as.matrix(hmTest_bothSexes)
colo = colorRamp2(c(-0.5, 0, 0.5), c("#005AB5", "black", "#DC3220")) # Sets the color of the heatmap
Heatmap(hmTest_bothSexes, col = colo, cluster_rows = FALSE, # this keeps order of rownames 
        name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 2), width = unit(7, "cm"), cluster_columns = F)

## the below code is getting the gene names by the organism
# data.frame(D_melanogaster = hmTest_females$gene_protein[hmTest_females$organism == "D_melanogaster"],
#            P_interpunctella = hmTest_females$gene_protein[hmTest_females$organism == "P_interpunctella"],
#            N_furzeri = hmTest_females$gene_protein[hmTest_females$organism == "N_furzeri"], # arguments imply differing number of rows: 7, 10 (doesn't like making data frame with differnt number of rows)
#            R_norvegicus = hmTest_females$gene_protein[hmTest_females$organism == "R_norvegicus"],
#            M_musculus = hmTest_females$gene_protein[hmTest_females$organism == "M_musculus"],
#            H_sapiens = hmTest_females$gene_protein[hmTest_females$organism == "H_sapiens"])
## the above did not work. I just saved the uncut heatmap to pdf and personally but lines between the genes for each species.
```


```{r}
# I will not try what I did above but with only DEGS
hmTest <- allActinExpression
hmTest_DEGsDefined <- hmTest$gene_protein[hmTest$Reg != "not"] # gave me a list of all DEGs
hmTest_DEGs <- hmTest[hmTest$gene_protein %in% hmTest_DEGsDefined,] # gave me dataframe with only DEGs and no-DEGs of the other sex
# make sex a factor
hmTest_DEGs <- hmTest_DEGs %>%
  mutate(Sex = factor(Sex)) 

levels(hmTest_DEGs$Sex)

#View(hmTest_DEGs)

sort_param <- data.frame(Female = hmTest_DEGs$log2FoldChange[hmTest_DEGs$Sex == "female"], Male = hmTest_DEGs$log2FoldChange[hmTest_DEGs$Sex == "male"])
#            P_interpunctella = hmTest_females$gene_protein[hmTest_females$organism == "P_interpunctella"],

hmTest_DEGs_females <- hmTest_DEGs[hmTest_DEGs$Sex == "female",]
hmTest_DEGs_females2 <- hmTest_DEGs_females[c(1,3)]  
names(hmTest_DEGs_females2)[2] = "Females"

# View(hmTest_females)
# View(hmTest) #same order, good!

hmTest_DEGs_males <- hmTest_DEGs[hmTest_DEGs$Sex == "male",]
hmTest_DEGs_males2 <- hmTest_DEGs_males[c(1,3)]  
names(hmTest_DEGs_males2)[2] = "Males" 

hmTest_bothSexes <- merge(hmTest_females2, hmTest_males2, by="gene_protein") # using merge() alphebatized the genes (I did not want this)
# I will try left_join() instead
hmTest_DEGs_bothSexes <- left_join(hmTest_DEGs_females2, hmTest_DEGs_males2, by="gene_protein")


rownames(hmTest_DEGs_bothSexes) = hmTest_DEGs_bothSexes$gene_protein
hmTest_DEGs_bothSexes <- hmTest_DEGs_bothSexes[,-1]
hmTest_DEGs_bothSexes <- as.matrix(hmTest_DEGs_bothSexes)
colo = colorRamp2(c(-0.5, 0, 0.5), c("#005AB5", "black", "#DC3220")) # Sets the color of the heatmap
Heatmap(hmTest_DEGs_bothSexes, col = colo, cluster_rows = FALSE, # this keeps order of rownames 
        name = "Log 2 Fold Change", column_title = "", column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize =12), column_names_rot = 0, column_names_centered = TRUE, row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 2), width = unit(7, "cm"), cluster_columns = F)
```


```{r}
m2 = matrix(1:100, nr = 10, byrow = TRUE)
Heatmap(hmTest_bothSexes, name = "mat", row_dend_reorder = FALSE, column_title = "no reordering") ## use this
Heatmap(hmTest_bothSexes, name = "mat", row_dend_reorder = TRUE, column_title = "apply reordering")

dim(hmTest_bothSexes)

Heatmap(hmTest_bothSexes, name = "mat", row_dend_reorder = FALSE, column_title = "no reordering", cluster_rows = F) ## this keeps same order as matrix. This order is not the same order as the data frame! BOO!!
hmTest

test <- as.matrix(hmTest)

Heatmap(test)

#?Heatmap

# Main data matrix (e.g., gene expression)
set.seed(123)
expression_mat = matrix(rnorm(100), nrow = 10, ncol = 10, 
                        dimnames = list(paste0("Gene", 1:10), paste0("Sample", 1:10)))

# Third variable (e.g., sample gender, a categorical variable for columns)
sample_gender = sample(c("Male", "Female"), 10, replace = TRUE)
gender_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(gender = sample_gender, 
                                      col = list(gender = c("Male" = "skyblue", "Female" = "pink")),
                                      name = "Sample Gender")

# Create the heatmap with the top annotation
draw(Heatmap(expression_mat, name = "Expression", top_annotation = gender_annotation))
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
nr1 = 4; nr2 = 8; nr3 = 6; nr = nr1 + nr2 + nr3
nc1 = 6; nc2 = 8; nc3 = 10; nc = nc1 + nc2 + nc3
mat = cbind(rbind(matrix(rnorm(nr1*nc1, mean = 1,   sd = 0.5), nr = nr1),
          matrix(rnorm(nr2*nc1, mean = 0,   sd = 0.5), nr = nr2),
          matrix(rnorm(nr3*nc1, mean = 0,   sd = 0.5), nr = nr3)),
    rbind(matrix(rnorm(nr1*nc2, mean = 0,   sd = 0.5), nr = nr1),
          matrix(rnorm(nr2*nc2, mean = 1,   sd = 0.5), nr = nr2),
          matrix(rnorm(nr3*nc2, mean = 0,   sd = 0.5), nr = nr3)),
    rbind(matrix(rnorm(nr1*nc3, mean = 0.5, sd = 0.5), nr = nr1),
          matrix(rnorm(nr2*nc3, mean = 0.5, sd = 0.5), nr = nr2),
          matrix(rnorm(nr3*nc3, mean = 1,   sd = 0.5), nr = nr3))
   )
mat = mat[sample(nr, nr), sample(nc, nc)] # random shuffle rows and columns
rownames(mat) = paste0("row", seq_len(nr))
colnames(mat) = paste0("column", seq_len(nc))

pa = cluster::pam(mat, k = 3)
pa$clustering

Heatmap(mat, name = "mat", row_dend_reorder = FALSE, column_title = "no reordering", 
        row_split = paste0("pam", hmTest_bothSexes)) ## use this
```

######OG0000053
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000053 and includes proteins of NaChannel

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000053") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
NaChannel_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000053") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
NaChannel_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000053") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% NaChannel_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
NaChannel_femFly <- rownames_to_column(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000053") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
NaChannel_femD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000053") %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000053") %>%

                                             "DEG_M","not"))

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000053") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
NaChannel_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000053") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% NaChannel_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(NaChannel_femD.melanogaster, NaChannel_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(NaChannel_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(NaChannel_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(NaChannel_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(NaChannel_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(NaChannel_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(NaChannel_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(NaChannel_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(NaChannel_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(NaChannel_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(NaChannel_maleH.sapiens) -> allNaChannelExpression
#View(allNaChannelExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allNaChannelExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/bothSexes/OG0000053/allNaChannelExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000053", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allNaChannelExpression$organism <- factor(allNaChannelExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_NaChannel <- allNaChannelExpression[allNaChannelExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_NaChannel <- allNaChannelExpression[allNaChannelExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allNaChannelExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_NaChannel, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_NaChannel, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the NaChannel orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
                                             %in% hsp70_maleMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
hsp70_femMouse <- rownames_to_column(femmouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
hsp70_femM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% hsp70_femMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 13 proteins in this orthogroup
hsp70_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
hsp70_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% hsp70_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
hsp70_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
hsp70_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% hsp70_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(hsp70_femD.melanogaster, hsp70_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(hsp70_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(hsp70_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(hsp70_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(hsp70_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(hsp70_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(hsp70_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(hsp70_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(hsp70_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(hsp70_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(hsp70_maleH.sapiens) -> allhsp70Expression
#View(allhsp70Expression)
#save dataframe above
# write.xlsx(allhsp70Expression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/_Update_noXmac/SupplementalFiles/SupplementalFile_7_HSP70genesListInOG.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000071", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allhsp70Expression$organism <- factor(allhsp70Expression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_hsp70 <- allhsp70Expression[allhsp70Expression$Sex=="male",] 
F_hsp70 <- allhsp70Expression[allhsp70Expression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allhsp70Expression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_hsp70, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_hsp70, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the hsp70 orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0001512 and includes proteins of SPARC

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001512") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001512") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
SPARC_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001512") %>%

                                             %in% SPARC_maleFly$gene,

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001512") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
SPARC_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%

                                             %in% SPARC_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
SPARC_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001512") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
SPARC_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001512") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% SPARC_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(SPARC_femD.melanogaster, SPARC_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(SPARC_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(SPARC_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(SPARC_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(SPARC_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(SPARC_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(SPARC_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(SPARC_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(SPARC_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(SPARC_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(SPARC_maleH.sapiens) -> allSPARCExpression
#View(allSPARCExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allSPARCExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/bothSexes/OG0001512/allSPARCExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001512", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allSPARCExpression$organism <- factor(allSPARCExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_SPARC <- allSPARCExpression[allSPARCExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_SPARC <- allSPARCExpression[allSPARCExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allSPARCExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_SPARC, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_SPARC, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the SPARC orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% filter(organism=="N_furzeri") # 10 proteins in this orthogroup
GPD1_maleKillifish <- rownames_to_column(malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
GPD1_maleN.furzeri <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% GPD1_maleKillifish$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
GPD1_femKillifish <- rownames_to_column(femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
GPD1_femN.furzeri <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% 
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% GPD1_femKillifish$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% filter(organism=="R_norvegicus") # 17 proteins in this orthogroup
GPD1_maleRat <- rownames_to_column(malerat_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>%

                                             %in% GPD1_maleRat$gene,

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% filter(organism=="M_musculus") # 18 proteins in this orthogroup
GPD1_maleMouse <- rownames_to_column(malemouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%

  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>%

  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
GPD1_femM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 13 proteins in this orthogroup
GPD1_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
GPD1_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% GPD1_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
GPD1_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
GPD1_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002215") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% GPD1_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(GPD1_femD.melanogaster, GPD1_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(GPD1_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(GPD1_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(GPD1_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(GPD1_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(GPD1_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(GPD1_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(GPD1_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(GPD1_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(GPD1_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(GPD1_maleH.sapiens) -> allGPD1Expression
#View(allGPD1Expression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allGPD1Expression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/bothSexes/OG0002215/allGPD1Expression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0002215", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allGPD1Expression$organism <- factor(allGPD1Expression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_GPD1 <- allGPD1Expression[allGPD1Expression$Sex=="male",] 
F_GPD1 <- allGPD1Expression[allGPD1Expression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allGPD1Expression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_GPD1, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_GPD1, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the GPD1 orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

#### Female biased
######OG0000089
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000089 and includes proteins of fourteen_three_threeProtein

# combine all dataframes
full_join(fourteen_three_threeProtein_femD.melanogaster, fourteen_three_threeProtein_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(fourteen_three_threeProtein_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(fourteen_three_threeProtein_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(fourteen_three_threeProtein_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(fourteen_three_threeProtein_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(fourteen_three_threeProtein_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(fourteen_three_threeProtein_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(fourteen_three_threeProtein_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(fourteen_three_threeProtein_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(fourteen_three_threeProtein_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(fourteen_three_threeProtein_maleH.sapiens) -> allfourteen_three_threeProteinExpression
#View(allfourteen_three_threeProteinExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allfourteen_three_threeProteinExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0000089/allfourteen_three_threeProteinExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000089", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allfourteen_three_threeProteinExpression$organism <- factor(allfourteen_three_threeProteinExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_fourteen_three_threeProtein <- allfourteen_three_threeProteinExpression[allfourteen_three_threeProteinExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_fourteen_three_threeProtein <- allfourteen_three_threeProteinExpression[allfourteen_three_threeProteinExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allfourteen_three_threeProteinExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_fourteen_three_threeProtein, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_fourteen_three_threeProtein, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the 14-3-3 Protein orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0000317
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000317 and includes proteins of serine_threonine_kinase

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000317") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
serine_threonine_kinase_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000317") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
serine_threonine_kinase_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000317") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% serine_threonine_kinase_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
serine_threonine_kinase_femFly <- rownames_to_column(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000317") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
serine_threonine_kinase_femD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000317") %>%

                                             %in% serine_threonine_kinase_femFly$gene,

# combine all dataframes
full_join(serine_threonine_kinase_femD.melanogaster, serine_threonine_kinase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(serine_threonine_kinase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(serine_threonine_kinase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(serine_threonine_kinase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(serine_threonine_kinase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(serine_threonine_kinase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(serine_threonine_kinase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(serine_threonine_kinase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(serine_threonine_kinase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(serine_threonine_kinase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(serine_threonine_kinase_maleH.sapiens) -> allserine_threonine_kinaseExpression
#View(allserine_threonine_kinaseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allserine_threonine_kinaseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0000317/allserine_threonine_kinaseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000317", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allserine_threonine_kinaseExpression$organism <- factor(allserine_threonine_kinaseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_serine_threonine_kinase <- allserine_threonine_kinaseExpression[allserine_threonine_kinaseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_serine_threonine_kinase <- allserine_threonine_kinaseExpression[allserine_threonine_kinaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allserine_threonine_kinaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_serine_threonine_kinase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_serine_threonine_kinase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the serine/threonine kinase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% DYRK_maleRat$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
DYRK_femRat <- rownames_to_column(femrat_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
DYRK_femR.norvegicus <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% DYRK_femRat$gene, 
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% filter(organism=="M_musculus") # 18 proteins in this orthogroup
DYRK_maleMouse <- rownames_to_column(malemouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
DYRK_maleM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% DYRK_maleMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
DYRK_femMouse <- rownames_to_column(femmouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
DYRK_femM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% DYRK_femMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 13 proteins in this orthogroup
DYRK_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
DYRK_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% DYRK_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
DYRK_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
DYRK_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000430") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% DYRK_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(DYRK_femD.melanogaster, DYRK_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(DYRK_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(DYRK_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(DYRK_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(DYRK_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(DYRK_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(DYRK_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(DYRK_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(DYRK_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(DYRK_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(DYRK_maleH.sapiens) -> allDYRKExpression
#View(allDYRKExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allDYRKExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0000430/allDYRKExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000430", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allDYRKExpression$organism <- factor(allDYRKExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_DYRK <- allDYRKExpression[allDYRKExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_DYRK <- allDYRKExpression[allDYRKExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allDYRKExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_DYRK, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_DYRK, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the DYRK orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0000445
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000445 and includes proteins of SERCA

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
SERCA_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
SERCA_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% SERCA_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%

                                             %in% SERCA_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(SERCA_femD.melanogaster, SERCA_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_maleH.sapiens) -> allSERCAExpression
#View(allSERCAExpression)
#save dataframe above
# write.xlsx(allSERCAExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/_Update_noXmac/SupplementalFiles/SupplementalFile_6_SERCAgenesListInOG.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000445", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistent order
allSERCAExpression$organism <- factor(allSERCAExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_SERCA <- allSERCAExpression[allSERCAExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_SERCA <- allSERCAExpression[allSERCAExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allSERCAExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_SERCA, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_SERCA, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the SERCA orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000524") %>%

                                             %in% phosphodiesterase_maleFly$gene,

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000524") %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000524") %>%

                                             %in% phosphodiesterase_femFly$gene,

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000524") %>%

phosphodiesterase_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%

phosphodiesterase_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000524") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% phosphodiesterase_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(phosphodiesterase_femD.melanogaster, phosphodiesterase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(phosphodiesterase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(phosphodiesterase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(phosphodiesterase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(phosphodiesterase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(phosphodiesterase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(phosphodiesterase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(phosphodiesterase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(phosphodiesterase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(phosphodiesterase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(phosphodiesterase_maleH.sapiens) -> allphosphodiesteraseExpression
#View(allphosphodiesteraseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allphosphodiesteraseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0000524/allphosphodiesteraseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000524", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allphosphodiesteraseExpression$organism <- factor(allphosphodiesteraseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_phosphodiesterase <- allphosphodiesteraseExpression[allphosphodiesteraseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_phosphodiesterase <- allphosphodiesteraseExpression[allphosphodiesteraseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allphosphodiesteraseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_phosphodiesterase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_phosphodiesterase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the phosphodiesterase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0000645
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000645 and includes proteins of ezrin_moesin_radixin

  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000645") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% ezrin_moesin_radixin_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
ezrin_moesin_radixin_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000645") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
ezrin_moesin_radixin_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000645") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% ezrin_moesin_radixin_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(ezrin_moesin_radixin_femD.melanogaster, ezrin_moesin_radixin_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(ezrin_moesin_radixin_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(ezrin_moesin_radixin_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(ezrin_moesin_radixin_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(ezrin_moesin_radixin_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(ezrin_moesin_radixin_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(ezrin_moesin_radixin_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(ezrin_moesin_radixin_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(ezrin_moesin_radixin_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(ezrin_moesin_radixin_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(ezrin_moesin_radixin_maleH.sapiens) -> allezrin_moesin_radixinExpression
#View(allezrin_moesin_radixinExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allezrin_moesin_radixinExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0000645/allezrin_moesin_radixinExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000645", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allezrin_moesin_radixinExpression$organism <- factor(allezrin_moesin_radixinExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_ezrin_moesin_radixin <- allezrin_moesin_radixinExpression[allezrin_moesin_radixinExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_ezrin_moesin_radixin <- allezrin_moesin_radixinExpression[allezrin_moesin_radixinExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allezrin_moesin_radixinExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_ezrin_moesin_radixin, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_ezrin_moesin_radixin, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the ezrin/moesin/radixin orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0000694
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000694 and includes proteins of RNA_helicase

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000694") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
RNA_helicase_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000694") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
RNA_helicase_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000694") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% RNA_helicase_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
RNA_helicase_femFly <- rownames_to_column(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000694") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
RNA_helicase_femD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000694") %>%

                                             %in% RNA_helicase_femFly$gene,

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000694") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
RNA_helicase_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000694") %>%

                                             %in% RNA_helicase_maleHuman$gene,

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000694") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
RNA_helicase_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000694") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% RNA_helicase_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(RNA_helicase_femD.melanogaster, RNA_helicase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(RNA_helicase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(RNA_helicase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(RNA_helicase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(RNA_helicase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(RNA_helicase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(RNA_helicase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(RNA_helicase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(RNA_helicase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(RNA_helicase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(RNA_helicase_maleH.sapiens) -> allRNA_helicaseExpression
#View(allRNA_helicaseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allRNA_helicaseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0000694/allRNA_helicaseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000694", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allRNA_helicaseExpression$organism <- factor(allRNA_helicaseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_RNA_helicase <- allRNA_helicaseExpression[allRNA_helicaseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_RNA_helicase <- allRNA_helicaseExpression[allRNA_helicaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allRNA_helicaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_RNA_helicase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_RNA_helicase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the RNA-helicase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000756 and includes proteins of lamin

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>%

                                             %in% lamin_femMoth$gene,

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% filter(organism=="N_furzeri") # 10 proteins in this orthogroup
lamin_maleKillifish <- rownames_to_column(malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% lamin_maleKillifish$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
lamin_femKillifish <- rownames_to_column(femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
lamin_femN.furzeri <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% 
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% lamin_femKillifish$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% filter(organism=="R_norvegicus") # 17 proteins in this orthogroup
lamin_maleRat <- rownames_to_column(malerat_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
lamin_maleR.norvegicus <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>%

                                             %in% lamin_maleRat$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
lamin_femR.norvegicus <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% lamin_maleMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
lamin_femMouse <- rownames_to_column(femmouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
lamin_femM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% lamin_femMouse$gene,

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 13 proteins in this orthogroup
lamin_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
lamin_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% lamin_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
lamin_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
lamin_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000756") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% lamin_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(lamin_femD.melanogaster, lamin_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(lamin_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(lamin_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(lamin_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(lamin_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(lamin_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(lamin_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(lamin_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(lamin_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(lamin_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(lamin_maleH.sapiens) -> alllaminExpression
#View(alllaminExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(alllaminExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0000756/alllaminExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000756", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
alllaminExpression$organism <- factor(alllaminExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_lamin <- alllaminExpression[alllaminExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_lamin <- alllaminExpression[alllaminExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(alllaminExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_lamin, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_lamin, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the lamin orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%

# combine all dataframes
full_join(atlastin_femD.melanogaster, atlastin_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(atlastin_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(atlastin_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(atlastin_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(atlastin_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(atlastin_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(atlastin_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(atlastin_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(atlastin_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(atlastin_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(atlastin_maleH.sapiens) -> allatlastinExpression
#View(allatlastinExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allatlastinExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0001114/allatlastinExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001114", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allatlastinExpression$organism <- factor(allatlastinExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_atlastin <- allatlastinExpression[allatlastinExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_atlastin <- allatlastinExpression[allatlastinExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allatlastinExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_atlastin, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_atlastin, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the atlastin orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0001240
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0001240 and includes proteins of kinaseHeavyChain

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
kinaseHeavyChain_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
kinaseHeavyChain_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% kinaseHeavyChain_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
kinaseHeavyChain_femFly <- rownames_to_column(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
kinaseHeavyChain_femD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% kinaseHeavyChain_femFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>% filter(organism=="P_interpunctella") # 7 proteins in this orthogroup

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>%

                                             %in% kinaseHeavyChain_maleMoth$gene,

kinaseHeavyChain_femMoth <- rownames_to_column(femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>%

kinaseHeavyChain_femP.interpunctella <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%

kinaseHeavyChain_maleMouse <- rownames_to_column(malemouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%

  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>%
```
