```{r}
orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 13 proteins in this orthogroup
kinaseHeavyChain_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
kinaseHeavyChain_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% kinaseHeavyChain_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
kinaseHeavyChain_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
kinaseHeavyChain_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% kinaseHeavyChain_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(kinaseHeavyChain_femD.melanogaster, kinaseHeavyChain_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(kinaseHeavyChain_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(kinaseHeavyChain_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(kinaseHeavyChain_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(kinaseHeavyChain_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(kinaseHeavyChain_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(kinaseHeavyChain_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(kinaseHeavyChain_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(kinaseHeavyChain_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(kinaseHeavyChain_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(kinaseHeavyChain_maleH.sapiens) -> allkinaseHeavyChainExpression
#View(allkinaseHeavyChainExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allkinaseHeavyChainExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0001240/allkinaseHeavyChainExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001240", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allkinaseHeavyChainExpression$organism <- factor(allkinaseHeavyChainExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_kinaseHeavyChain <- allkinaseHeavyChainExpression[allkinaseHeavyChainExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_kinaseHeavyChain <- allkinaseHeavyChainExpression[allkinaseHeavyChainExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allkinaseHeavyChainExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_kinaseHeavyChain, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_kinaseHeavyChain, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the kinaseHeavyChain orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0001549
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0001549 and includes proteins of tribbles

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001549") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
tribbles_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001549") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001549") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% tribbles_femMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001549") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 13 proteins in this orthogroup
tribbles_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001549") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
tribbles_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001549") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% tribbles_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
tribbles_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001549") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
tribbles_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001549") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% tribbles_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(tribbles_femD.melanogaster, tribbles_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(tribbles_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(tribbles_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(tribbles_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(tribbles_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(tribbles_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(tribbles_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(tribbles_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(tribbles_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(tribbles_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(tribbles_maleH.sapiens) -> alltribblesExpression
#View(alltribblesExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(alltribblesExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0001549/alltribblesExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001549", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
alltribblesExpression$organism <- factor(alltribblesExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_tribbles <- alltribblesExpression[alltribblesExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_tribbles <- alltribblesExpression[alltribblesExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(alltribblesExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_tribbles, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_tribbles, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the tribbles orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%

  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% collagen_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(collagen_femD.melanogaster, collagen_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(collagen_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(collagen_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(collagen_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(collagen_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(collagen_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(collagen_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(collagen_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(collagen_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(collagen_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(collagen_maleH.sapiens) -> allcollagenExpression
#View(allcollagenExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allcollagenExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0001909/allcollagenExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001909", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allcollagenExpression$organism <- factor(allcollagenExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_collagen <- allcollagenExpression[allcollagenExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_collagen <- allcollagenExpression[allcollagenExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allcollagenExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_collagen, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_collagen, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the collagen orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_maleN.furzeri <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001925") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_maleKillifish$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femKillifish <- rownames_to_column(femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001925") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femN.furzeri <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% 
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001925") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femKillifish$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001925") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001925") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001925") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001925") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femD.melanogaster, proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C_maleH.sapiens) -> allproteinTransportProtein_Sec24CExpression
#View(allproteinTransportProtein_Sec24CExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allproteinTransportProtein_Sec24CExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0001925/allproteinTransportProtein_Sec24CExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001925", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allproteinTransportProtein_Sec24CExpression$organism <- factor(allproteinTransportProtein_Sec24CExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C <- allproteinTransportProtein_Sec24CExpression[allproteinTransportProtein_Sec24CExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C <- allproteinTransportProtein_Sec24CExpression[allproteinTransportProtein_Sec24CExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allproteinTransportProtein_Sec24CExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_proteinTransportProtein_Sec24C, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the Protein Transport Protein Sec24C orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0006309
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0006309 and includes proteins of MUSK

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0006309") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")

                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(MUSK_femD.melanogaster, MUSK_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(MUSK_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(MUSK_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(MUSK_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(MUSK_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(MUSK_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(MUSK_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(MUSK_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(MUSK_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(MUSK_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(MUSK_maleH.sapiens) -> allMUSKExpression
#View(allMUSKExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allMUSKExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/femaleBiased/OG0006309/allMUSKExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0006309", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allMUSKExpression$organism <- factor(allMUSKExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_MUSK <- allMUSKExpression[allMUSKExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_MUSK <- allMUSKExpression[allMUSKExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allMUSKExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_MUSK, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_MUSK, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the MUSK orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

#### Male biased
######OG0000015
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000015 and includes proteins of dyneinHeavyChain

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000015") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
dyneinHeavyChain_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000015") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
dyneinHeavyChain_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000015") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% dyneinHeavyChain_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
dyneinHeavyChain_femFly <- rownames_to_column(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000015") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
dyneinHeavyChain_femD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000015") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% dyneinHeavyChain_femFly$gene,

  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000015") %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%

                                             %in% dyneinHeavyChain_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(dyneinHeavyChain_femD.melanogaster, dyneinHeavyChain_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(dyneinHeavyChain_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(dyneinHeavyChain_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(dyneinHeavyChain_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(dyneinHeavyChain_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(dyneinHeavyChain_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(dyneinHeavyChain_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(dyneinHeavyChain_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(dyneinHeavyChain_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(dyneinHeavyChain_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(dyneinHeavyChain_maleH.sapiens) -> alldyneinHeavyChainExpression
#View(alldyneinHeavyChainExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(alldyneinHeavyChainExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0000015/alldyneinHeavyChainExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000015", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
alldyneinHeavyChainExpression$organism <- factor(alldyneinHeavyChainExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_dyneinHeavyChain <- alldyneinHeavyChainExpression[alldyneinHeavyChainExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_dyneinHeavyChain <- alldyneinHeavyChainExpression[alldyneinHeavyChainExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(alldyneinHeavyChainExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_dyneinHeavyChain, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_dyneinHeavyChain, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the dyneinHeavyChain orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
                                             %in% tubulin_alpha_femRat$gene, 
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000037") %>% filter(organism=="M_musculus") # 18 proteins in this orthogroup
tubulin_alpha_maleMouse <- rownames_to_column(malemouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000037") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
tubulin_alpha_maleM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000037") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% tubulin_alpha_maleMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
tubulin_alpha_femMouse <- rownames_to_column(femmouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000037") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
tubulin_alpha_femM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000037") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% tubulin_alpha_femMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000037") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 13 proteins in this orthogroup
tubulin_alpha_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000037") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
tubulin_alpha_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000037") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% tubulin_alpha_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
tubulin_alpha_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000037") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
tubulin_alpha_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000037") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% tubulin_alpha_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(tubulin_alpha_femD.melanogaster, tubulin_alpha_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_alpha_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_alpha_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_alpha_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_alpha_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_alpha_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_alpha_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_alpha_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_alpha_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_alpha_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_alpha_maleH.sapiens) -> alltubulin_alphaExpression
#View(alltubulin_alphaExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(alltubulin_alphaExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0000037/alltubulin_alphaExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000037", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
alltubulin_alphaExpression$organism <- factor(alltubulin_alphaExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_tubulin_alpha <- alltubulin_alphaExpression[alltubulin_alphaExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_tubulin_alpha <- alltubulin_alphaExpression[alltubulin_alphaExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(alltubulin_alphaExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_tubulin_alpha, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_tubulin_alpha, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the tubulin_alpha orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000052 and includes proteins of tubulin_beta

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000052") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000052") %>%

                                             %in% tubulin_beta_maleFly$gene,

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000052") %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000052") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% tubulin_beta_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(tubulin_beta_femD.melanogaster, tubulin_beta_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_beta_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_beta_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_beta_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_beta_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_beta_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_beta_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_beta_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_beta_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_beta_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(tubulin_beta_maleH.sapiens) -> alltubulin_betaExpression
#View(alltubulin_betaExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(alltubulin_betaExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0000052/alltubulin_betaExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000052", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
alltubulin_betaExpression$organism <- factor(alltubulin_betaExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_tubulin_beta <- alltubulin_betaExpression[alltubulin_betaExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_tubulin_beta <- alltubulin_betaExpression[alltubulin_betaExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(alltubulin_betaExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_tubulin_beta, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_tubulin_beta, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the tubulin_beta orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
adducin_maleP.interpunctella <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000106") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% adducin_maleMoth$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
adducin_femMoth <- rownames_to_column(femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000106") %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000106") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% adducin_femMoth$gene, 
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

adducin_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000106") %>%

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000106") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% adducin_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(adducin_femD.melanogaster, adducin_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(adducin_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(adducin_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(adducin_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(adducin_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(adducin_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(adducin_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(adducin_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(adducin_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(adducin_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(adducin_maleH.sapiens) -> alladducinExpression
#View(alladducinExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(alladducinExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0000106/alladducinExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000106", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
alladducinExpression$organism <- factor(alladducinExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_adducin <- alladducinExpression[alladducinExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_adducin <- alladducinExpression[alladducinExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(alladducinExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_adducin, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_adducin, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the adducin orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0000259
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000259 and includes proteins of VtypeProtonATPase

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000259") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
VtypeProtonATPase_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000259") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
VtypeProtonATPase_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000259") %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%

                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(VtypeProtonATPase_femD.melanogaster, VtypeProtonATPase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(VtypeProtonATPase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(VtypeProtonATPase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(VtypeProtonATPase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(VtypeProtonATPase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(VtypeProtonATPase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(VtypeProtonATPase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(VtypeProtonATPase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(VtypeProtonATPase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(VtypeProtonATPase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(VtypeProtonATPase_maleH.sapiens) -> allVtypeProtonATPaseExpression
#View(allVtypeProtonATPaseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allVtypeProtonATPaseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0000259/allVtypeProtonATPaseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000259", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allVtypeProtonATPaseExpression$organism <- factor(allVtypeProtonATPaseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_VtypeProtonATPase <- allVtypeProtonATPaseExpression[allVtypeProtonATPaseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_VtypeProtonATPase <- allVtypeProtonATPaseExpression[allVtypeProtonATPaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allVtypeProtonATPaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_VtypeProtonATPase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_VtypeProtonATPase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the V-type Proton ATPase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0000261
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000261 and includes proteins of creatineKinase

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
creatineKinase_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
creatineKinase_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% creatineKinase_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
creatineKinase_femFly <- rownames_to_column(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
creatineKinase_femD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% creatineKinase_femFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>% filter(organism=="P_interpunctella") # 7 proteins in this orthogroup

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>%

                                             %in% creatineKinase_maleMoth$gene,

creatineKinase_femMoth <- rownames_to_column(femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>%

creatineKinase_femP.interpunctella <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>%

                                             %in% creatineKinase_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
creatineKinase_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000261") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% creatineKinase_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(creatineKinase_femD.melanogaster, creatineKinase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(creatineKinase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(creatineKinase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(creatineKinase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(creatineKinase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(creatineKinase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(creatineKinase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(creatineKinase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(creatineKinase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(creatineKinase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(creatineKinase_maleH.sapiens) -> allcreatineKinaseExpression
#View(allcreatineKinaseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allcreatineKinaseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0000261/allcreatineKinaseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000261", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allcreatineKinaseExpression$organism <- factor(allcreatineKinaseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_creatineKinase <- allcreatineKinaseExpression[allcreatineKinaseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_creatineKinase <- allcreatineKinaseExpression[allcreatineKinaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allcreatineKinaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_creatineKinase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_creatineKinase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the creatineKinase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
CAMK_DCLK_maleR.norvegicus <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% CAMK_DCLK_maleRat$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
CAMK_DCLK_femRat <- rownames_to_column(femrat_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
CAMK_DCLK_femR.norvegicus <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% CAMK_DCLK_femRat$gene, 
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% filter(organism=="M_musculus") # 18 proteins in this orthogroup
CAMK_DCLK_maleMouse <- rownames_to_column(malemouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
CAMK_DCLK_maleM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% CAMK_DCLK_maleMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
CAMK_DCLK_femMouse <- rownames_to_column(femmouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
CAMK_DCLK_femM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% CAMK_DCLK_femMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 13 proteins in this orthogroup
CAMK_DCLK_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
CAMK_DCLK_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% CAMK_DCLK_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
CAMK_DCLK_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
CAMK_DCLK_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000298") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% CAMK_DCLK_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(CAMK_DCLK_femD.melanogaster, CAMK_DCLK_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(CAMK_DCLK_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(CAMK_DCLK_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(CAMK_DCLK_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(CAMK_DCLK_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(CAMK_DCLK_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(CAMK_DCLK_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(CAMK_DCLK_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(CAMK_DCLK_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(CAMK_DCLK_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(CAMK_DCLK_maleH.sapiens) -> allCAMK_DCLKExpression
#View(allCAMK_DCLKExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allCAMK_DCLKExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0000298/allCAMK_DCLKExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000298", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allCAMK_DCLKExpression$organism <- factor(allCAMK_DCLKExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_CAMK_DCLK <- allCAMK_DCLKExpression[allCAMK_DCLKExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_CAMK_DCLK <- allCAMK_DCLKExpression[allCAMK_DCLKExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allCAMK_DCLKExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_CAMK_DCLK, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_CAMK_DCLK, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the CAMK_DCLK orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000670") %>%

                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(sodiumPotassiumATPase_femD.melanogaster, sodiumPotassiumATPase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(sodiumPotassiumATPase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(sodiumPotassiumATPase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(sodiumPotassiumATPase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(sodiumPotassiumATPase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(sodiumPotassiumATPase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(sodiumPotassiumATPase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(sodiumPotassiumATPase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(sodiumPotassiumATPase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(sodiumPotassiumATPase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(sodiumPotassiumATPase_maleH.sapiens) -> allsodiumPotassiumATPaseExpression
#View(allsodiumPotassiumATPaseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allsodiumPotassiumATPaseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0000670/allsodiumPotassiumATPaseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000670", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allsodiumPotassiumATPaseExpression$organism <- factor(allsodiumPotassiumATPaseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_sodiumPotassiumATPase <- allsodiumPotassiumATPaseExpression[allsodiumPotassiumATPaseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_sodiumPotassiumATPase <- allsodiumPotassiumATPaseExpression[allsodiumPotassiumATPaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allsodiumPotassiumATPaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_sodiumPotassiumATPase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_sodiumPotassiumATPase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the Sodium-Potassium ATPase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0000695
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000695 and includes proteins of aldoKetoReductase

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000695") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
aldoKetoReductase_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000695") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
aldoKetoReductase_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000695") %>%

                                             %in% aldoKetoReductase_maleFly$gene,

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000695") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% aldoKetoReductase_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(aldoKetoReductase_femD.melanogaster, aldoKetoReductase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(aldoKetoReductase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(aldoKetoReductase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(aldoKetoReductase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(aldoKetoReductase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(aldoKetoReductase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(aldoKetoReductase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(aldoKetoReductase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(aldoKetoReductase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(aldoKetoReductase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(aldoKetoReductase_maleH.sapiens) -> allaldoKetoReductaseExpression
#View(allaldoKetoReductaseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allaldoKetoReductaseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0000695/allaldoKetoReductaseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000695", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allaldoKetoReductaseExpression$organism <- factor(allaldoKetoReductaseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_aldoKetoReductase <- allaldoKetoReductaseExpression[allaldoKetoReductaseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_aldoKetoReductase <- allaldoKetoReductaseExpression[allaldoKetoReductaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allaldoKetoReductaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_aldoKetoReductase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_aldoKetoReductase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the aldo-Keto Reductase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0000803
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0000803 and includes proteins of rhoGTPase

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000803") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000803") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
rhoGTPase_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000803") %>%

                                             %in% rhoGTPase_maleFly$gene,

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%

  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000803") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
rhoGTPase_femM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000803") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% rhoGTPase_femMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000803") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 13 proteins in this orthogroup
rhoGTPase_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000803") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
rhoGTPase_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000803") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% rhoGTPase_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
rhoGTPase_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000803") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
rhoGTPase_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000803") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% rhoGTPase_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(rhoGTPase_femD.melanogaster, rhoGTPase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(rhoGTPase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(rhoGTPase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(rhoGTPase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(rhoGTPase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(rhoGTPase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(rhoGTPase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(rhoGTPase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(rhoGTPase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(rhoGTPase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(rhoGTPase_maleH.sapiens) -> allrhoGTPaseExpression
#View(allrhoGTPaseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allrhoGTPaseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0000803/allrhoGTPaseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000803", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allrhoGTPaseExpression$organism <- factor(allrhoGTPaseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_rhoGTPase <- allrhoGTPaseExpression[allrhoGTPaseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_rhoGTPase <- allrhoGTPaseExpression[allrhoGTPaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allrhoGTPaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_rhoGTPase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_rhoGTPase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the Rho GTPase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
  full_join(VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel_maleH.sapiens) -> allVDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannelExpression
#View(allVDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannelExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allVDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannelExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0000970/allVDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannelExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0000970", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allVDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannelExpression$organism <- factor(allVDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannelExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel <- allVDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannelExpression[allVDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannelExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel <- allVDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannelExpression[allVDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannelExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allVDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannelExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the VDAC_voltageDependantAnionChannel orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0001011 and includes proteins of aminolevulinateSynthase

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001011") %>%

                                             %in% aminolevulinateSynthase_maleFly$gene,

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001011") %>%

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001011") %>% filter(organism=="P_interpunctella") # 7 proteins in this orthogroup
aminolevulinateSynthase_maleMoth <- rownames_to_column(malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001011") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
aminolevulinateSynthase_maleP.interpunctella <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001011") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% aminolevulinateSynthase_maleMoth$gene,

  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% aminolevulinateSynthase_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(aminolevulinateSynthase_femD.melanogaster, aminolevulinateSynthase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(aminolevulinateSynthase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(aminolevulinateSynthase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(aminolevulinateSynthase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(aminolevulinateSynthase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(aminolevulinateSynthase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(aminolevulinateSynthase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(aminolevulinateSynthase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(aminolevulinateSynthase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(aminolevulinateSynthase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(aminolevulinateSynthase_maleH.sapiens) -> allaminolevulinateSynthaseExpression
#View(allaminolevulinateSynthaseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allaminolevulinateSynthaseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0001011/allaminolevulinateSynthaseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001011", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allaminolevulinateSynthaseExpression$organism <- factor(allaminolevulinateSynthaseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_aminolevulinateSynthase <- allaminolevulinateSynthaseExpression[allaminolevulinateSynthaseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_aminolevulinateSynthase <- allaminolevulinateSynthaseExpression[allaminolevulinateSynthaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allaminolevulinateSynthaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_aminolevulinateSynthase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_aminolevulinateSynthase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the Aminolevulinate Synthase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0001091
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0001091 and includes proteins of ADP_ATP_translocase

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001091") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
ADP_ATP_translocase_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001091") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
ADP_ATP_translocase_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001091") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% ADP_ATP_translocase_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
ADP_ATP_translocase_femFly <- rownames_to_column(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001091") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
```
