```{r}
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001091") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
ADP_ATP_translocase_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001091") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% ADP_ATP_translocase_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(ADP_ATP_translocase_femD.melanogaster, ADP_ATP_translocase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(ADP_ATP_translocase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(ADP_ATP_translocase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(ADP_ATP_translocase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(ADP_ATP_translocase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(ADP_ATP_translocase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(ADP_ATP_translocase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(ADP_ATP_translocase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(ADP_ATP_translocase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(ADP_ATP_translocase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(ADP_ATP_translocase_maleH.sapiens) -> allADP_ATP_translocaseExpression
#View(allADP_ATP_translocaseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allADP_ATP_translocaseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0001091/allADP_ATP_translocaseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001091", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allADP_ATP_translocaseExpression$organism <- factor(allADP_ATP_translocaseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_ADP_ATP_translocase <- allADP_ATP_translocaseExpression[allADP_ATP_translocaseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_ADP_ATP_translocase <- allADP_ATP_translocaseExpression[allADP_ATP_translocaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allADP_ATP_translocaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_ADP_ATP_translocase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_ADP_ATP_translocase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the ADP_ATP_translocase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
  full_join(valine_tRNA_ligase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(valine_tRNA_ligase_femH.sapiens) %>%

# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes

F_valine_tRNA_ligase <- allvaline_tRNA_ligaseExpression[allvaline_tRNA_ligaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allvaline_tRNA_ligaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_valine_tRNA_ligase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_valine_tRNA_ligase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the valine_tRNA_ligase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_maleN.furzeri <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001095") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_maleKillifish$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))

  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_femD.melanogaster, cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase_maleH.sapiens) -> allcholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferaseExpression
#View(allcholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferaseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allcholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferaseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0001095/allcholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferaseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001095", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allcholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferaseExpression$organism <- factor(allcholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferaseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase <- allcholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferaseExpression[allcholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferaseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase <- allcholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferaseExpression[allcholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allcholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_cholinePhosphateCytidylyltransferase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the Choline-Phosphate Cytidylyltransferase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0001103
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0001103 and includes proteins of transcriptionFactor_NF_E2

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001103") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
transcriptionFactor_NF_E2_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001103") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")

  full_join(transcriptionFactor_NF_E2_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(transcriptionFactor_NF_E2_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(transcriptionFactor_NF_E2_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(transcriptionFactor_NF_E2_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(transcriptionFactor_NF_E2_maleH.sapiens) -> alltranscriptionFactor_NF_E2Expression
#View(alltranscriptionFactor_NF_E2Expression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(alltranscriptionFactor_NF_E2Expression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0001103/alltranscriptionFactor_NF_E2Expression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001103", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
alltranscriptionFactor_NF_E2Expression$organism <- factor(alltranscriptionFactor_NF_E2Expression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_transcriptionFactor_NF_E2 <- alltranscriptionFactor_NF_E2Expression[alltranscriptionFactor_NF_E2Expression$Sex=="male",] 
F_transcriptionFactor_NF_E2 <- alltranscriptionFactor_NF_E2Expression[alltranscriptionFactor_NF_E2Expression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(alltranscriptionFactor_NF_E2Expression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_transcriptionFactor_NF_E2, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_transcriptionFactor_NF_E2, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the transcriptionFactor_NF_E2 orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0001254
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0001254 and includes proteins of veryLongChain3R_dehyratase

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001254") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001254") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001254") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_femFly <- rownames_to_column(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001254") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_femD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001254") %>%

veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_femP.interpunctella <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%

# combine all dataframes
full_join(veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_femD.melanogaster, veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(veryLongChain3R_dehyratase_maleH.sapiens) -> allveryLongChain3R_dehyrataseExpression
#View(allveryLongChain3R_dehyrataseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allveryLongChain3R_dehyrataseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0001254/allveryLongChain3R_dehyrataseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001254", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allveryLongChain3R_dehyrataseExpression$organism <- factor(allveryLongChain3R_dehyrataseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_veryLongChain3R_dehyratase <- allveryLongChain3R_dehyrataseExpression[allveryLongChain3R_dehyrataseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_veryLongChain3R_dehyratase <- allveryLongChain3R_dehyrataseExpression[allveryLongChain3R_dehyrataseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allveryLongChain3R_dehyrataseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_veryLongChain3R_dehyratase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_veryLongChain3R_dehyratase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the veryLongChain3R_dehyratase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_femN.furzeri <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% 
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001377") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_femKillifish$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

                                             %in% cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_femD.melanogaster, cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase_maleH.sapiens) -> allcytoplasmicAconitateHydrataseExpression
#View(allcytoplasmicAconitateHydrataseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allcytoplasmicAconitateHydrataseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0001377/allcytoplasmicAconitateHydrataseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001377", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allcytoplasmicAconitateHydrataseExpression$organism <- factor(allcytoplasmicAconitateHydrataseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase <- allcytoplasmicAconitateHydrataseExpression[allcytoplasmicAconitateHydrataseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase <- allcytoplasmicAconitateHydrataseExpression[allcytoplasmicAconitateHydrataseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allcytoplasmicAconitateHydrataseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the cytoplasmicAconitateHydratase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0001518
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0001518 and includes proteins of eukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProtein

#View(alleukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProteinExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(alleukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProteinExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0001518/alleukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProteinExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001518", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
alleukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProteinExpression$organism <- factor(alleukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProteinExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_eukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProtein <- alleukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProteinExpression[alleukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProteinExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_eukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProtein <- alleukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProteinExpression[alleukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProteinExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(alleukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProteinExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_eukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProtein, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_eukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProtein, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the eukaryoticTranslationInitiationFactor4E_bindingProtein orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0001664
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0001664 and includes proteins of nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001664") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001664") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001664") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_femFly <- rownames_to_column(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001664") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_femD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001664") %>%

                                             %in% nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_femFly$gene,

# combine all dataframes
full_join(nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_femD.melanogaster, nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D_maleH.sapiens) -> allnucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35DExpression
#View(allnucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35DExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allnucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35DExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0001664/allnucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35DExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001664", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allnucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35DExpression$organism <- factor(allnucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35DExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D <- allnucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35DExpression[allnucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35DExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D <- allnucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35DExpression[allnucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35DExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allnucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35DExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the nucleotideSugarTransporterSLC35D orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femKillifish$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% filter(organism=="R_norvegicus") # 17 proteins in this orthogroup
mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleRat <- rownames_to_column(malerat_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleR.norvegicus <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleRat$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femRat <- rownames_to_column(femrat_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femR.norvegicus <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleMouse <- rownames_to_column(malemouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%

mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femMouse <- rownames_to_column(femmouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>%

mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>%

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 13 proteins in this orthogroup
mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001777") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femD.melanogaster, mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialCarrierProteins_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialCarrierProteins_maleH.sapiens) -> allmitochondrialCarrierProteinsExpression
#View(allmitochondrialCarrierProteinsExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allmitochondrialCarrierProteinsExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0001777/allmitochondrialCarrierProteinsExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001777", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allmitochondrialCarrierProteinsExpression$organism <- factor(allmitochondrialCarrierProteinsExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_mitochondrialCarrierProteins <- allmitochondrialCarrierProteinsExpression[allmitochondrialCarrierProteinsExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_mitochondrialCarrierProteins <- allmitochondrialCarrierProteinsExpression[allmitochondrialCarrierProteinsExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allmitochondrialCarrierProteinsExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_mitochondrialCarrierProteins, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_mitochondrialCarrierProteins, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the mitochondrialCarrierProteins orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

######OG0001782
```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0001782 and includes proteins of inositolMonophosphate

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001782") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
inositolMonophosphate_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001782") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
inositolMonophosphate_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0001782") %>%

                                             %in% inositolMonophosphate_maleFly$gene,

                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(inositolMonophosphate_femD.melanogaster, inositolMonophosphate_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(inositolMonophosphate_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(inositolMonophosphate_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(inositolMonophosphate_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(inositolMonophosphate_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(inositolMonophosphate_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(inositolMonophosphate_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(inositolMonophosphate_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(inositolMonophosphate_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(inositolMonophosphate_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(inositolMonophosphate_maleH.sapiens) -> allinositolMonophosphateExpression
#View(allinositolMonophosphateExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allinositolMonophosphateExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0001782/allinositolMonophosphateExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0001782", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allinositolMonophosphateExpression$organism <- factor(allinositolMonophosphateExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_inositolMonophosphate <- allinositolMonophosphateExpression[allinositolMonophosphateExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_inositolMonophosphate <- allinositolMonophosphateExpression[allinositolMonophosphateExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allinositolMonophosphateExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_inositolMonophosphate, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_inositolMonophosphate, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the inositolMonophosphate orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0002431 and includes proteins of acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002431") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup

  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002431") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0002431") %>%

  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_femD.melanogaster, acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase_maleH.sapiens) -> allacetylCoenzymeA_synthetaseExpression
#View(allacetylCoenzymeA_synthetaseExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allacetylCoenzymeA_synthetaseExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0002431/allacetylCoenzymeA_synthetaseExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0002431", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allacetylCoenzymeA_synthetaseExpression$organism <- factor(allacetylCoenzymeA_synthetaseExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase <- allacetylCoenzymeA_synthetaseExpression[allacetylCoenzymeA_synthetaseExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase <- allacetylCoenzymeA_synthetaseExpression[allacetylCoenzymeA_synthetaseExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allacetylCoenzymeA_synthetaseExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the acetylCoenzymeA_synthetase orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
egl_nine_homolog_maleMouse <- rownames_to_column(malemouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0003240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
egl_nine_homolog_maleM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0003240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% egl_nine_homolog_maleMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
egl_nine_homolog_femMouse <- rownames_to_column(femmouse_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0003240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
egl_nine_homolog_femM.musculus <- lfcShrink(mouse_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_mouse) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0003240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% egl_nine_homolog_femMouse$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0003240") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 13 proteins in this orthogroup
egl_nine_homolog_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0003240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
egl_nine_homolog_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0003240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% egl_nine_homolog_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
egl_nine_homolog_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0003240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
egl_nine_homolog_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0003240") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% egl_nine_homolog_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(egl_nine_homolog_femD.melanogaster, egl_nine_homolog_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(egl_nine_homolog_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(egl_nine_homolog_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(egl_nine_homolog_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(egl_nine_homolog_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(egl_nine_homolog_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(egl_nine_homolog_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(egl_nine_homolog_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(egl_nine_homolog_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(egl_nine_homolog_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(egl_nine_homolog_maleH.sapiens) -> allegl_nine_homologExpression
#View(allegl_nine_homologExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allegl_nine_homologExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0003240/allegl_nine_homologExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0003240", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allegl_nine_homologExpression$organism <- factor(allegl_nine_homologExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_egl_nine_homolog <- allegl_nine_homologExpression[allegl_nine_homologExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_egl_nine_homolog <- allegl_nine_homologExpression[allegl_nine_homologExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allegl_nine_homologExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_egl_nine_homolog, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_egl_nine_homolog, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the egl_nine_homolog orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
# combine all dataframes
full_join(mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_femD.melanogaster, mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier_maleH.sapiens) -> allmitochondrialPyruvateCarrierExpression
#View(allmitochondrialPyruvateCarrierExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allmitochondrialPyruvateCarrierExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0004974/allmitochondrialPyruvateCarrierExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0004974", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allmitochondrialPyruvateCarrierExpression$organism <- factor(allmitochondrialPyruvateCarrierExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier <- allmitochondrialPyruvateCarrierExpression[allmitochondrialPyruvateCarrierExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier <- allmitochondrialPyruvateCarrierExpression[allmitochondrialPyruvateCarrierExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allmitochondrialPyruvateCarrierExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the mitochondrialPyruvateCarrier orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
## This orthogroup number is OG0006103 and includes proteins of phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%

  mutate(Sex="male")

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0006103") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0006103") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_femD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%

                                             "DEG_F","not"))


# combine all dataframes
full_join(phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_femD.melanogaster, phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_maleD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_femP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit_maleH.sapiens) -> allphosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunitExpression
#View(allphosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunitExpression)
#save dataframe above
#write.xlsx(allphosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunitExpression, file = "/Users/school/Documents/Documents/UAB/UAB005/Manuscript/Figures_V7_noXmac/pics/lfcPlots/maleBiased/OG0006103/allphosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunitExpression.xlsx", sheetName = "OG0006103", row.names = F)

# set levels for my factors to keep in consistant order
allphosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunitExpression$organism <- factor(allphosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunitExpression$organism, levels = c("D_melanogaster", "P_interpunctella", "N_furzeri", "R_norvegicus", "M_musculus", "H_sapiens"))
# subset the data by sexes for graphoing purposes
M_phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit <- allphosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunitExpression[allphosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunitExpression$Sex=="male",] 
F_phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit <- allphosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunitExpression[allphosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunitExpression$Sex=="female",]

## graph
ggplot(allphosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunitExpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the phosphorylase_b_KinaseRegulatorySubunit orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
```

```{r}
## let me select all the DEGs that are within the orthogroup for SERCA from all species and sexes then join them and plot
#the orthogroup that contains SERCA proteins is OG0000445
# this is just me checking how many proteins/genes are in this orthogroup
orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 1 proteins in this orthogroup
SERCA_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
SERCA_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% SERCA_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))

  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%

  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>%

                                             %in% SERCA_femFly$gene,

  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% mutate(Sex="female")
SERCA_femR.norvegicus <- lfcShrink(rat_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_rat) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% SERCA_femRat$gene, 
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% filter(organism=="N_furzeri") # 4 proteins in this orthogroup
SERCA_maleKillifish <- rownames_to_column(malekillifish_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
SERCA_maleN.furzeri <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% 
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% SERCA_maleKillifish$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
SERCA_femKillifish <- rownames_to_column(femkillifish_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
SERCA_femN.furzeri <- lfcShrink(killifish_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% 
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_killifish) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% SERCA_femKillifish$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% filter(organism=="P_interpunctella") # 1 proteins in this orthogroup
SERCA_maleMoth <- rownames_to_column(malemoth_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
SERCA_maleP.interpunctella <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% 
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% SERCA_maleMoth$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
SERCA_femMoth <- rownames_to_column(femmoth_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
SERCA_femP.interpunctella <- lfcShrink(moth_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>% 
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_moth) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000445") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% SERCA_femMoth$gene, 
                                             "DEG_F","not"))
# combine all dataframes
full_join(SERCA_maleD.melanogaster, SERCA_femD.melanogaster) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_maleH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_femH.sapiens) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_maleM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_femM.musculus) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_maleR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_femR.norvegicus) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_maleN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_femN.furzeri) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_maleP.interpunctella) %>%
  full_join(SERCA_femP.interpunctella)-> allSERCAexpression
#View(allSERCAexpression)
## need to add rows for the organisms and sexes that did not have DEGs associated with the orthogroup of interest ## might not need to do this after the new way I coded it. I will hold off on this
# allSERCAexpression2 <- allSERCAexpression %>%  add_row(log2FoldChange=0,organism="H_sapiens", Sex="male")

allSERCAexpression$organism <- factor(allSERCAexpression$organism, levels=rev(c("H_sapiens", "M_musculus", "R_norvegicus", "N_furzeri", "P_interpunctella", "D_melanogaster")))
allSERCAexpression$orgSex <- factor(paste(allSERCAexpression$organism, allSERCAexpression$Sex, sep = "_")) 
# orignial graph with only sig genes
allSERCAexpression_SigOnly <- allSERCAexpression[!grepl("not", allSERCAexpression$Reg),]
allSERCAexpression_SigOnly <- allSERCAexpression_SigOnly %>% add_row(log2FoldChange=0,organism="H_sapiens", Sex="male")
allSERCAexpression_SigOnly$organism <- factor(allSERCAexpression_SigOnly$organism, levels=rev(c("H_sapiens", "M_musculus", "R_norvegicus", "N_furzeri", "P_interpunctella", "D_melanogaster")))

ggplot(allSERCAexpression_SigOnly, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_boxplot()  +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("grey", "grey20","grey","grey20","grey", "grey20","grey", "grey20","grey", "grey20","grey", "grey20")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform DEGs within SERCA orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Sex), position=position_jitterdodge(jitter.height = 0, jitter.width = 0.01)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
# original graph with more points for non-sig genes
M_SERCA <- allSERCAexpression[allSERCAexpression$Sex=="male",] #subset by sex for points
F_SERCA <- allSERCAexpression[allSERCAexpression$Sex=="female",]
allSERCAexpression$organism <- factor(allSERCAexpression$organism, levels=rev(c("H_sapiens", "M_musculus", "R_norvegicus", "N_furzeri", "P_interpunctella", "D_melanogaster")))
ggplot(allSERCAexpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_boxplot()  +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("grey", "grey20","grey","grey20","grey", "grey20","grey", "grey20","grey", "grey20","grey", "grey20")) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the SERCA orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  geom_point(data=M_SERCA, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19)) +
  geom_point(data=F_SERCA, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="cornsilk4"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
## new graph
ggplot(allSERCAexpression, aes(x=organism, y=log2FoldChange, fill=Sex)) +
  geom_point(data=M_SERCA, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=0.19), size = 4) +
  geom_point(data=F_SERCA, aes(color=Reg), position=position_nudge(x=-0.19), size = 4) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(fill="none") +
  labs(x="", y="log2 fold change", title = "Paralog/Isoform genes associated with the SERCA orthogroup") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=10, color="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=14),
        title = element_text(size=12, face="bold")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("DEG_F"="#F8766D", "DEG_M"="#00BFC4", "not"="grey"), labels = c("DEG_F"="female DEG", "DEG_M"="male DEG", "not"="not sig")) +
  labs(color = "Genes in orthogroup")  +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype=2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype=2, color="grey90") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-1, linetype=2, color="grey90")
# so these are plotting lfc only. So when an organism only has one significantly expressed gene that corresponds to this orthogroup it will be just a point but if the organism has many paralogs that are significantly expressed it will be a boxplot!

######################################################################################################
#Now we will do everything above but for the HSP70 Orthogroup
## This was the one orthogoup that had all species in it. The number is OG0000071
orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% filter(organism=="D_melanogaster") # 11 proteins in this orthogroup
hsp70_maleFly <- rownames_to_column(malefly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
hsp70_maleD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>% 
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>% 
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% hsp70_maleFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
hsp70_femFly <- rownames_to_column(femfly_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
hsp70_femD.melanogaster <- lfcShrink(fly_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_fly) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% hsp70_femFly$gene, 
                                             "DEG_F","not"))

orthogroups %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% filter(organism=="H_sapiens") # 8 proteins in this orthogroup
hsp70_maleHuman <- rownames_to_column(malehuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male")
hsp70_maleH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldmale", "youngmale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="male") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% hsp70_maleHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_M","not"))
hsp70_femHuman <- rownames_to_column(femhuman_resSig_lfcShrink,"gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  inner_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female")
hsp70_femH.sapiens <- lfcShrink(human_dds2, contrast = c("group", "oldfemale", "youngfemale"), type = "ashr", alpha = 0.05, lfcThreshold = 0) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  mutate(gene = str_remove(gene, "\\..*")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, log2FoldChange) %>%
  inner_join(gene2tx2protein_human) %>%
  left_join(orthogroups) %>% filter(Orthogroup == "OG0000071") %>% 
  mutate(Sex="female") %>% mutate(Reg=ifelse(gene
                                             %in% hsp70_femHuman$gene,
                                             "DEG_F","not"))
## Above we are missing the gene associated with protein NP_002146 or HSPA6. A Google search indicates this is common in RNA-seq as this hsp's expression is strictly stress-induced and not typically detectable under normal conditions. Instead of 8 genes, 7 came back
```
